      28.Gale: Go, have fun. I promise I'll stay out of trouble for one evening. [End]

      Metadata

    511.Gale: Goodness me. Well this is a rather pleasant change of pace, isn't it?END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellKarlachEPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Gale

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Gale

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: ebb69d48-97fd-bab6-77f3-37ed6bbb29cdSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h102d9934g2f4ag49c0g944eg16ac58b18e77Text UUID: 643bdb56-4d9a-46f1-a3f6-9b3f1fd25213Timeline Phase Index: 5Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ebb69d48-97fd-bab6-77f3-37ed6bbb29cdTimeline Phase Duration: 11.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      134.Gale: You're certain we shouldn't have, you know, dressed up a bit?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3baf135b-f587-4e38-b92a-f7d157371366Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h064c2c9eg7e0ag46bag9ee8g862a3eab9911Text UUID: 99256abf-3a05-4d5e-8b7a-ee7ba56e3608Group ID: ebb69d48-97fd-bab6-77f3-37ed6bbb29cdGroup Index: 1
      • +
        9.Player: Are you kidding? We look fantastic.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 04924db5-2af6-15ed-9e59-229207abaca1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h86a43534g5696g4211gbd39g51eb8b90d700Text UUID: d5e03026-2158-40e8-9724-4fbbeefff5a4Show Once: True
        • +
          434.Gale: I suppose we do have a certain singed sophistication to us, though I fear the fact we stink like rotten eggs shatters the illusion somewhat.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c9ca7009-b529-d9fe-4eef-7341b9daabf3Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h6d21de6fg5a9dg47f4g9ff2g5630e8145e4cText UUID: 2e4429f5-a18b-4a00-b7bf-34c0bfd2d39dTimeline Phase Index: 96Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c9ca7009-b529-d9fe-4eef-7341b9daabf3Timeline Phase Duration: 10.23sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • +
            356.Gale: Ignore me - I'm merely overwhelmed to feel Faerunian soil beneath my boots once more. To breathe air unsullied by the noxious breath of a pursuing cambion.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a1b3b519-5977-23b2-0812-98ccd13e4a76Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hd9a4d8adg9b93g4c27ga185g5c093fba71ddText UUID: 95767e22-a7c0-45d2-b9fb-bc627c2e473fTimeline Phase Index: 24Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a1b3b519-5977-23b2-0812-98ccd13e4a76Timeline Phase Duration: 14.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • •

      • +
        510.Player: We're fighting in the Blood Wars, Gale. No one expects us to have dressed for the occasion.!EPI_Epilogue_State_AstarionPresent

        Flags and Tags

        • EPI_Epilogue_State_AstarionPresent {d742f00c-889a-4d7b-acaa-343f8a354607} = False

        474.Player: We're fighting in the Blood Wars, Gale. No one's going to be judging our outfits. Well, maybe Astarion...EPI_Epilogue_State_AstarionPresent

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • EPI_Epilogue_State_AstarionPresent {d742f00c-889a-4d7b-acaa-343f8a354607} = True

        • See Node 11 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 356
      • +
        320.Player: I'll have you know this is my least fucked up outfit...

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8bdcefd7-f8b7-91b4-c94b-5bd634f7a5bcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5f382449gfb0ag4531gb4d6gcfd134d1126fText UUID: 8d920d17-d06e-4330-ae2b-5bb0e72b022dShow Once: True
        • +
          256.Gale: And of course you look resplendent in it. Positively glowing... though that may be your infernal engine making itself known.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 72129ae5-339f-b2f1-ec54-52d6b2a789e2Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: haa50d551gdb00g4ba5g9df0gfc0ebe4645f2Text UUID: 2bfcc91a-bca5-4712-a367-58ddba5e5a19Timeline Phase Index: 33Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 72129ae5-339f-b2f1-ec54-52d6b2a789e2Timeline Phase Duration: 9.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • See Node 356 (Gale) Ignore me - I'm merely overwhelmed to feel Faerunian soil beneath my boots once more. To breathe air unsullied by the noxious breath of a pursuing cambion.

      357.Gale: Our adventures rarely lend themselves to luxury. Or cleanliness, for that matter. It's been some time since I've made such an effort...

      Metadata

      127.Gale: I confess, I wasn't entirely sure what to wear. Usually our meetings are a little more, er, clandestine, shall we say...

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 36b8153e-1d15-a18b-d4ee-e4212b7dd2daSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h262cf5bdg105bg483dg87afgfaae0f5f8b23Text UUID: aefa85c1-fb4d-4616-9351-653cd8dc5ccbGroup ID: ed3a5f54-99d5-c6a6-5028-91ec02699132Group Index: 1
      • •

  • -
    413.Gale: You're quite certain I look acceptable?ORI_Gale_State_ReturnedToWaterdeepORI_State_PartneredWithGaleEPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Gale

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: c01f1996-b6b5-4438-abcd-64b5d5380a82Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: he613d488g339bg4ff1gb246g21cfefc806d8Text UUID: 0e85fbd2-80dc-4b02-9be6-0ca398af4831Timeline Phase Index: 7Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c01f1996-b6b5-4438-abcd-64b5d5380a82Timeline Phase Duration: 3.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Root: True
    • +
      396.Gale: I can't remember when I last wore something other than my teaching robes. It feels a little odd to find myself in something so unsinged.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b969a9a7-7f2c-4aed-b251-fb5d84e39fa0Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hda7f2576gae9dg40fdg919cg1b4ef001c16fText UUID: 218ebbab-9e84-4e07-949a-6e20dbe5d871Timeline Phase Index: 84Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b969a9a7-7f2c-4aed-b251-fb5d84e39fa0Timeline Phase Duration: 9.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 4
      • +
        200.Player: You look as wonderful to me as you did on our wedding day.Full-IllithidORI_Gale_State_Married

        Flags and Tags

        You look as wonderful to me as you did on our wedding day.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5beddad1-c42b-b405-cb91-fd8d6828478aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hc994c9dfg4a2eg4a6ag8f44g6285e51ebe5cText 1 UUID: 236e6fd7-7a32-490a-9a56-e1661a36d052Text 2 Handle: ha813822fgd3f6g4185g8b58g1284fd80a75fText 2 UUID: 48f0bdd7-57bb-48b1-97cd-24da2507cd3fShow Once: True
        • +
          231.Gale: That's a relief. I wasn't sure if I'd made too much of an effort. Or perhaps, not enough...

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 66ef7713-f7ce-d7bd-c511-24b8b7d94446Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h9cc72fd4g0f2eg4cbfg8ecag1f31f35ebb01Text UUID: df1a4748-30b7-4e49-bf1a-ca1aa02893e4Timeline Phase Index: 102Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 66ef7713-f7ce-d7bd-c511-24b8b7d94446Timeline Phase Duration: 9.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • +
            164.Speaker 2: If only you'd applied those efforts to that thing on your chin...8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Script
            • 8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922 = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4b4d6a29-d703-3ec2-efd1-577e6d6ea7acSpeaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: h2a460d30g8e93g4104g966egf8128870cf0aText UUID: 549c4be7-f28d-4f59-8e25-560468b8a995Timeline Phase Index: 184Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4b4d6a29-d703-3ec2-efd1-577e6d6ea7acTimeline Phase Duration: 3.93sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
            • +
              280.Gale: The day I shave this beard, Tara, is that day I shave you. For both of our sakes, I hope it never comes.8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Script
              • 8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922 = True

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 79d1a588-802c-ab1b-aa7e-253eabcc1833Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: ha3b1d39cg88e8g4dfbga73aga6cc140c757cText UUID: c7b4cd83-10a7-4417-b729-b379ff9c4d1bTimeline Phase Index: 44Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 79d1a588-802c-ab1b-aa7e-253eabcc1833Timeline Phase Duration: 8.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Optional: TrueAddressed Speaker: 2
              • +
                419.Gale: I won't keep you to myself for too long, but while I have you - I want to say thank you for encouraging me to attend this evening.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c1b40e36-825e-ee2f-597c-28bd0d60abc8Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h5cfaaf91g4efag42a0ga061gd29f1b41076bText UUID: a702df36-dc56-449c-86ce-a93aa9fab0b7Timeline Phase Index: 93Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c1b40e36-825e-ee2f-597c-28bd0d60abc8Timeline Phase Duration: 11.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Addressed Speaker: 1
                • +
                  337.Gale: Teaching at Blackstaff Academy has proven such an unexpected pleasure. Sometimes I find it hard to tear myself away.ORI_Gale_State_ReturnedToWaterdeep

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • ORI_Gale_State_ReturnedToWaterdeep {c7b41398-0b76-4c71-8825-2e16ff810199} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9584d00f-9532-2a9d-7eaa-8a5d1f3ac5e9Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hdacd9b03g8083g4858g86eagf5b1f3fa83e7Text UUID: 2cb6ee06-b358-4b39-a490-ced4c3ec91afTimeline Phase Index: 30Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9584d00f-9532-2a9d-7eaa-8a5d1f3ac5e9Timeline Phase Duration: 21.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 9584d00f-9532-2a9d-7eaa-8a5d1f3ac5e9Group Index: 0
                  • +
                    243.Gale: Just one of the myriad unexpected ways life has delighted me in recent months.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6d096d74-04c7-6bee-5a26-ccd6c8838823Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h94e9937agedd5g4539g9ac4g613db582d1a8Text UUID: 8df59044-efa8-4879-a78c-6a416402af5bGroup ID: 9584d00f-9532-2a9d-7eaa-8a5d1f3ac5e9Group Index: 1
                    • +
                      508.Gale: Even my own city feels new to me, now that I share it with you.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e9f74052-534e-5d6f-8b8b-7f4cd28a3b3cSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h8461baecgae16g43edg92f5g4462af4bfcbfText UUID: 58cb2c52-384c-44bc-afbe-08d16cfc78eeGroup ID: 9584d00f-9532-2a9d-7eaa-8a5d1f3ac5e9Group Index: 2
                      • +
                        32.Player: Probably because I make you put down your quill once in a while and enjoy it.Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        ruletagtype rule
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                        Text

                        Variant 1

                        combine=0
                        • Full-Illithid
                        Probably because I make you put down your quill once in a while and enjoy it.
                        hc78b28b5g30e8g44ccg8b51g904a4ee4b975 | 89d8ccd5-8980-49bd-b7e5-c333e4b87d67 | stub

                        Variant 2

                        Probably because I make you put down your quill once in a while and enjoy it.
                        he9eed05egaadfg43c1ga36dg4487c9a8fffa | c70f3fe7-31d2-426b-81cb-a5e44a16284b | stub

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0efc435f-639e-6e0f-64a9-f187277f37c5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hc78b28b5g30e8g44ccg8b51g904a4ee4b975Text 1 UUID: 89d8ccd5-8980-49bd-b7e5-c333e4b87d67Text 2 Handle: he9eed05egaadfg43c1ga36dg4487c9a8fffaText 2 UUID: c70f3fe7-31d2-426b-81cb-a5e44a16284bShow Once: True
                        • +
                          93.Gale: That you do. I've not had so much fun in Waterdeep since my own days as a wayward Blackstaff apprentice.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 29e9ae89-8a9f-ddda-4b64-5c09cb8c37d9Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hd7845b09g2869g4b00g8558g2bf7118bf364Text UUID: 48a73826-c820-4bdf-a582-2cc67fb546fcTimeline Phase Index: 124Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 29e9ae89-8a9f-ddda-4b64-5c09cb8c37d9Timeline Phase Duration: 8.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • +
                            191.Gale: You've certainly made quite the impression on my friends down at the Yawning Portal. The last I heard, they were thinking of naming a drink after you.!Full-Illithid

                            Flags and Tags

                            checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                            • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 57814bac-9948-9966-a543-f0940875edd7Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hc4b5a804ga037g4addgba73gab0ecdc3481eText UUID: 14e9ed60-257b-4d57-8d77-119c63ef500cTimeline Phase Index: 157Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 57814bac-9948-9966-a543-f0940875edd7Timeline Phase Duration: 11.68sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Optional: True
                            • +
                              123.Gale: I'm just glad you're happy there. When we met, our lives were rather different, and being here this evening... well, it reminds me how much has changed.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 34df5175-3437-aa76-390c-f044ca9fd54dSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hd971f284g169fg4ed7g88cfgc210c09b6873Text UUID: af3696cb-b0c6-4ab1-a212-8b5c3598248fTimeline Phase Index: 186Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 34df5175-3437-aa76-390c-f044ca9fd54dTimeline Phase Duration: 12.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                              • +
                                199.Gale: When Mystra quelled the orb at last, she did more than rid me of its threat. She created room for hope, where once I felt only despair.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5b8dd827-360b-402b-cbdb-486717fe07f8Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h8105e4d1g7bfdg4243ga16fg3a51c9291dedText UUID: 82680ae6-77c9-4d36-92d1-50e9fd71623bTimeline Phase Index: 161Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5b8dd827-360b-402b-cbdb-486717fe07f8Timeline Phase Duration: 9.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                • +
                                  512.Gale: Standing here now I no longer see the people we were - frightened, desperate, alone. We changed. We survived. And we did it together.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ec82bc5c-3074-9910-7f4d-ace3bc8a27c5Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: ha198a92egdc52g4f2agabe4g1d9e3463962dText UUID: c6f8749e-1d3b-4213-a1dd-aeac7e618e0fTimeline Phase Index: 160Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ec82bc5c-3074-9910-7f4d-ace3bc8a27c5Timeline Phase Duration: 24.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: ec82bc5c-3074-9910-7f4d-ace3bc8a27c5Group Index: 0
                                  • +
                                    198.Gale: I've missed them. I've missed this.note: On 'this', a gesture indicating to the wider camp/troupe - he's missed standing in a camp like this, with the gang for company

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5b2f41ab-b849-2275-27a3-90daa481db31Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hb9dc9796gf228g4c0fgb3f4gf89b5ab599d9Text UUID: d331e5e5-bd2f-436d-ad3d-0472c74345e6Group ID: ec82bc5c-3074-9910-7f4d-ace3bc8a27c5Group Index: 1
                                    • +
                                      50.Player: So have I. Sometimes I wish our adventure never ended.Full-IllithidKarlach

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      ruletagtype rule
                                      • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                                      • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}

                                      Text

                                      Variant 1

                                      combine=0
                                      • Full-Illithid
                                      So have I. Sometimes I wish our adventure never ended.
                                      h2d957461g66b3g4186gba6ag8ae8db2f31c7 | f0b33dcf-907a-42f3-b9e8-eead2088d3cc | stub

                                      Variant 2

                                      combine=0
                                      • Karlach
                                      So have I. Sometimes I wish our adventure never ended.
                                      h3d65eedcg94efg46c7gac19ge6909eea2b0e | 22f04b77-d9ae-4c62-ac88-8a88696f5e17 | stub

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 15ac0305-1d61-aea3-be0c-b5cf2411418bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h2d957461g66b3g4186gba6ag8ae8db2f31c7Text 1 UUID: f0b33dcf-907a-42f3-b9e8-eead2088d3ccText 2 Handle: h3d65eedcg94efg46c7gac19ge6909eea2b0eText 2 UUID: 22f04b77-d9ae-4c62-ac88-8a88696f5e17Show Once: True
                                      • +
                                        35.Gale: I wouldn't go quite that far. Living without the threat of imminent ceremorphosis seems infinitely preferable to life on the precipice of such a transformation.Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        ruletagtype rule
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                                        Text

                                        Variant 1

                                        combine=0
                                        • Full-Illithid
                                        I wouldn't go quite that far. Living without the threat of imminent ceremorphosis seems infinitely preferable to life on the precipice of such a transformation.
                                        h7d0f9b3bg8759g4b23gb943g0080688e4e19 | 06156055-0c7c-4494-b8a1-571bdfd02eae | stub

                                        Variant 2

                                        combine=0
                                        • Full-Illithid
                                        I wouldn't go quite that far. You made sacrifice enough to end it when we did - I dread to think what else might have come, had it gone on for longer.
                                        hd5a5fc35gb79ag452dga4a7ge810fa31d8d4 | b912f1a5-2d5c-4f6a-8f9b-c923f5b0c7b7 | stub

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 110c72d9-8b28-43f6-53c3-753f7110b043Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text 1 Handle: h7d0f9b3bg8759g4b23gb943g0080688e4e19Text 1 UUID: 06156055-0c7c-4494-b8a1-571bdfd02eaeText 2 Handle: hd5a5fc35gb79ag452dga4a7ge810fa31d8d4Text 2 UUID: b912f1a5-2d5c-4f6a-8f9b-c923f5b0c7b7Timeline Phase Index: 144Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 110c72d9-8b28-43f6-53c3-753f7110b043Timeline Phase Duration: 11.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • +
                                          494.Gale: As I told you long ago - it is to be avoided.!Full-Illithid

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                          • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e5e495c6-31a7-c78b-edd8-fb3ba7a4db4aSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: haf52b73eg6680g4d3eg8903g970a190cff59Text UUID: 535170c5-d9b0-4211-a560-efdaa9b9fcf8Timeline Phase Index: 61Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e5e495c6-31a7-c78b-edd8-fb3ba7a4db4aTimeline Phase Duration: 5.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Optional: True
                                          • +
                                            133.Gale: Gods knows, we suffered for our salvation, but it was worth it, wasn't it?

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3b892ff8-316f-5812-a06c-5a5a2dd4e63dSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hb44f2bd2gffd3g4a72ga85dg9b66c20e3adcText UUID: 204a8a5a-313e-4086-8af8-7a7210b2d7a6Timeline Phase Index: 185Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3b892ff8-316f-5812-a06c-5a5a2dd4e63dTimeline Phase Duration: 16.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 3b892ff8-316f-5812-a06c-5a5a2dd4e63dGroup Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              505.Gale: We did something incredible. And wherever life takes us - we'll carry the memory of that with us forever.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e9a4e725-2867-26be-5aa7-9fb04421f08bSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h2c6ab531gb051g4b75g97d3gcdd81e222a60Text UUID: 5b577548-a7c4-49c8-b8cf-bf1810b7a577Group ID: 3b892ff8-316f-5812-a06c-5a5a2dd4e63dGroup Index: 1
                                              • •
                                                102.Jump to Node 452

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: JumpUUID: 2e851045-9d66-ca80-b3ea-7b0020b2a25eJump Target: Node 452 (d3371f44-c0bd-d5d6-24ca-2ed1b1cc6fb5)Jump Target Point: 1
                                    • +
                                      74.Player: You know, you aren't tied to Avernus forever. You could come back any time.END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell!Full-IllithidKarlach

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      checktype Object | speaker 0 Gale
                                      • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = True

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2316a9b0-ef2f-ffd8-0d03-f65d869ef9c3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h336b91ebg704ag4e1eg9edagc8e500ed921cText UUID: 5d4dcf12-6e60-465a-9d40-2a21ccc9e585Show Once: True
                                      • +
                                        230.Gale: Without you? Not a tressym in Hell's chance.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 66e3c750-63fe-2040-adf6-3bfd444c7dd8Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h0f3ac1e9gcf64g44c3ga90eg522f66616e70Text UUID: fc2c09c3-049b-4b2e-9b49-e2493f7fad4dTimeline Phase Index: 103Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 66e3c750-63fe-2040-adf6-3bfd444c7dd8Timeline Phase Duration: 4.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • +
                                          149.Speaker 2: Why, I do just fine in the Hells, Mr Dekarios. A bit of heat in these old bones is quite the luxury.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 41340457-b45d-8bb0-a637-91d93ff25106Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: h3f4787d1g8c19g4bb1g97bdga75c157a29f2Text UUID: e53bc335-51be-4ff3-ab07-9fb9892092beTimeline Phase Index: 182Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 41340457-b45d-8bb0-a637-91d93ff25106Timeline Phase Duration: 8.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                          • +
                                            380.Gale: Quite right. And we're delighted every time the catflap of displacement brings you to us.8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922

                                            Flags and Tags

                                            checktype Script
                                            • 8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922 = True

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b3601f35-b7f4-ebf7-3d31-0596f92e5dffSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h2944670fg6975g4ea0ga390g6f167a70d191Text UUID: abec494c-328f-425c-8605-b37e165357efTimeline Phase Index: 80Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b3601f35-b7f4-ebf7-3d31-0596f92e5dffTimeline Phase Duration: 7.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Location Changes: Shoo Tara (e9ddb077-0b03-4ab1-a201-e9adc744d289) @ 751.87sOptional: True
                                            • +
                                              277.Gale: No, fear not - I've no burning desire to return to this plane. Strange as it is to say, I'm feeling rather at home in Avernus.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 785017d0-09a0-4cc5-c571-d2234efbfeadSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hf0120c0ag2765g4a85g8242gf7b9878f35c2Text UUID: 8f02c46e-a75c-463d-a528-04e08868964aTimeline Phase Index: 43Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 785017d0-09a0-4cc5-c571-d2234efbfeadTimeline Phase Duration: 10.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                                              • +
                                                354.Gale: And with both Tara and I hard at work studying the finer points of devilish engineering, who knows - we might make a home in Waterdeep yet.8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Script
                                                • 8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922 = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a099fc5b-13ec-bd13-8330-a2136064ae6fSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hddc5a6bag1448g4bccgb715g995d9ec88d57Text UUID: 0181b888-587f-40fb-9414-583d7b7aa8e1Timeline Phase Index: 23Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a099fc5b-13ec-bd13-8330-a2136064ae6fTimeline Phase Duration: 12.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                • +
                                                  452.Gale: Now, much as I could spend an eternity in your company - we see plenty of each other already.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d3371f44-c0bd-d5d6-24ca-2ed1b1cc6fb5Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h2e1680afgf878g460eg825bg699f38fcd41cText UUID: 02274097-d31a-4be5-8856-ebca192864a6Timeline Phase Index: 109Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d3371f44-c0bd-d5d6-24ca-2ed1b1cc6fb5Timeline Phase Duration: 16.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: d3371f44-c0bd-d5d6-24ca-2ed1b1cc6fb5Group Index: 0
                                                  • +

                                                209.Gale: And so long as I continue my studies on the finer points of infernal engineering, who knows - we might make a home in Waterdeep yet.

                                                Metadata

                                        135.Gale: We have had some fun, haven't we?

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3bc4e8fa-1b87-a103-6093-ffc7238b0abbSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h767d762eg5001g4d2fg883eg80a9bbd8ed0eText UUID: ca8bf111-2476-4cb5-9e7b-90e5314abebfTimeline Phase Index: 177Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3bc4e8fa-1b87-a103-6093-ffc7238b0abbTimeline Phase Duration: 18.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 3bc4e8fa-1b87-a103-6093-ffc7238b0abbGroup Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          335.Gale: I suppose you're right. Our adventures had their time and place, but it's good that we've moved forward. Carved out a life for ourselves every bit as rich and rewarding as the journey that brought us together.

                                          Text

                                          I suppose you're right. Our adventures had their time and place, but it's good that we've moved forward. Carved out a life for ourselves every bit as rich and rewarding as the journey that brought us together.

                                        347.Gale: I'm not sure I'll ever get over my good fortune in that respect. You are the happiness I never dreamed I could deserve.

                                      • +
                                        293.Gale: No, no, I prefer the warmth of my library's hearth these days. But the feeling of adventure... I confess - that I long for.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 81511f99-67c2-ac84-3f84-d4b1eb12c823Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h21ab3365gf75bg45c3ga3cfgfde27eae509aText UUID: cfd26dce-2cab-4f34-95cf-ce159e1359f6Timeline Phase Index: 47Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 81511f99-67c2-ac84-3f84-d4b1eb12c823Timeline Phase Duration: 14.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • +
                                          184.Speaker 2: Now, Mr Dekarios, we've spoken about this. You really must find safer pastimes - for your own good, and mine too.8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          checktype Script
                                          • 8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922 = True

                                          • +
                                            340.Gale: I have been dabbling with the idea of capturing our adventures with humble ink and parchment.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 98c5cca6-04c5-39ba-b9bf-adf1cfeb9384Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h8b45d816ga9c4g4c03ga879ga1d5901934ceText UUID: a1cb581d-7def-4675-b22d-d27edc541d94Timeline Phase Index: 120Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 98c5cca6-04c5-39ba-b9bf-adf1cfeb9384Timeline Phase Duration: 19.52sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 98c5cca6-04c5-39ba-b9bf-adf1cfeb9384Group Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              105.Gale: We've tales enough to fill a good few volumes, and when the truth runs out, who knows... My quill might take us on further adventures yet.

                                              Metadata

                                      478.Player: I'm a little surprised, but I feel the same. It's like coming home, or slipping on a pair of old, comfortable shoes.ShadowheartLae'zelWyllKarlachDark Urge!Full-Illithid

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      ruletagtype rule
                                      • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
                                      • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                      • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                      • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                      • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2}
                                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                      • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                      Text

                                      Variant 1

                                      combine=0
                                      • Shadowheart
                                      I'm a little surprised, but I feel the same. It's like coming home, or slipping on a pair of old, comfortable shoes.
                                      h3f977dcfg67f3g43bag952ag71d336173c40 | 985f6b11-b947-4ce4-b00e-b602b40e6e7c | stub

                                      Variant 2

                                      combine=0
                                      • Lae'zel
                                      They are kin now. I'm joyed to be among them.
                                      hdd4d7dc7g48bdg4e71g8b49gaccf0f4b9e50 | d4427cc7-6d38-49f2-a67a-5af6159ac42f | stub

                                      Variant 3

                                      combine=0
                                      • Wyll
                                      I can't imagine a better group of champions to have faced a big bulbous brain with.
                                      hca22e7b0g7068g4144gbef2gc4364311e90d | ac330478-5708-42eb-a6b4-1f07a0beeb71 | stub

                                      Variant 4

                                      combine=0
                                      • Karlach
                                      I have too. Terribly.
                                      ha6107605g586cg42c4ga099g2570f64e33fa | 0eb77c97-0c40-46a4-abe5-c0e7b2af030b | stub

                                      Variant 5

                                      combine=0
                                      • Dark Urge
                                      Our friends have no equals. They liked me, even when I was Bhaal's monster.
                                      hb043daf3gaa22g4069g81b2gd5f6393d0cc7 | 349dd30d-da5a-48b7-9edf-392c9dac0b41 | stub

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e08dea86-c1b3-1c6f-c460-fce26ca31e7bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h3f977dcfg67f3g43bag952ag71d336173c40Text 1 UUID: 985f6b11-b947-4ce4-b00e-b602b40e6e7cText 2 Handle: hdd4d7dc7g48bdg4e71g8b49gaccf0f4b9e50Text 2 UUID: d4427cc7-6d38-49f2-a67a-5af6159ac42fText 3 Handle: hca22e7b0g7068g4144gbef2gc4364311e90dText 3 UUID: ac330478-5708-42eb-a6b4-1f07a0beeb71Text 4 Handle: ha6107605g586cg42c4ga099g2570f64e33faText 4 UUID: 0eb77c97-0c40-46a4-abe5-c0e7b2af030bText 5 Handle: hb043daf3gaa22g4069g81b2gd5f6393d0cc7Text 5 UUID: 349dd30d-da5a-48b7-9edf-392c9dac0b41Show Once: True
                                      • +
                                        538.Gale: And I'm quite certain they're as delighted to see you as you are to see them.

                                        Metadata

                                        • +

                                      • +
                                        213.Gale: You feign indifference but I can see it in your eye. You're as delighted to be amongst this company as I am.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 61d99dfd-9f25-1eed-8a07-87289ed2f23fSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hb4df8616gf3feg4169g8ff3g93a11067159aText UUID: 2757e794-d64a-4954-a8e8-d4a38f42afe8Timeline Phase Index: 167Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 61d99dfd-9f25-1eed-8a07-87289ed2f23fTimeline Phase Duration: 7.93sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                        • See Node 455 (Gale) Speaking of which, I think it's high time you blessed someone other than myself with your inimitable presence.
                              • +
                                173.Gale: When our adventure began, our troupe had no more in common than the worm in our brains.DEPRECATED

                                Flags and Tags

                                checktype Global
                                • DEPRECATED {ba7e717d-0e07-4761-9eb7-b39e77d27a4e} = True

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4fc68191-2afb-5e2f-87ee-1cc895e0a31eSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hf34e2270g6c56g40ddgae49g6544e75b43b3Text UUID: abc720b5-e231-4de0-a53d-7f3d2777ae91Timeline Phase Index: 191Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4fc68191-2afb-5e2f-87ee-1cc895e0a31eTimeline Phase Duration: 4.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                • See Node 512 (Gale) Standing here now I no longer see the people we were - frightened, desperate, alone. We changed. We survived. And we did it together.
                      • +
                        366.Player: I've grown to love Waterdeep. Though I confess at first I found it a bit... overly pleased with itself.!Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: aaebbfac-713a-1c99-aa23-55e2f8f2f811Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h870f2ed0g55ffg47dcgab11g182c1d793420Text UUID: 09378b14-0f9b-4249-9e8d-91011d9c429dShow Once: True
                        • +
                          264.Gale: An impression I'm delighted the city has managed to redeem. As have I, I hope.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7400e80b-3f11-5318-45a8-932893490286Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hdf75d72bgd25cg4113gad15g71eeca7838b6Text UUID: cf3d99be-00ee-45da-be17-7a2f3bc3a731Timeline Phase Index: 38Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7400e80b-3f11-5318-45a8-932893490286Timeline Phase Duration: 7.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • See Node 123 (Gale) I'm just glad you're happy there. When we met, our lives were rather different, and being here this evening... well, it reminds me how much has changed.
                      • +
                        479.Player: Thankfully Waterdeep has plenty of amusements on offer during the hours of darkness...ORI_Astarion_State_CazadorPermaDefeated!ORI_Astarion_State_BecameVampireLord!Full-IllithidAstarion

                        Flags and Tags

                        • +
                          536.Gale: You've certainly exposed me to sides of Waterdeep I'd never had the pleasure of experiencing until now. If 'pleasure' is the word for such places...

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f656eb8b-360f-eacd-4927-b07d7fef62a5Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hbc052a2fge222g4537ga542g258d9450b493Text UUID: 9fbf035b-c53a-4df3-9810-6b02fff6290eTimeline Phase Index: 71Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f656eb8b-360f-eacd-4927-b07d7fef62a5Timeline Phase Duration: 9.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • See Node 123 (Gale) I'm just glad you're happy there. When we met, our lives were rather different, and being here this evening... well, it reminds me how much has changed.
                      • +
                        471.Player: I'm just glad Waterdeep is big enough to disappear into.!ORI_Astarion_State_CazadorPermaDefeated!Full-IllithidAstarion

                        • See Node 536 (Gale) You've certainly exposed me to sides of Waterdeep I'd never had the pleasure of experiencing until now. If 'pleasure' is the word for such places...
                      • +
                        218.Player: After everything that happened with my parents, with Shar... it's been good to have a life of my own making, with you.ORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_KilledParentsShadowheart!Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Global
                        • ORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_KilledParents {e9060caf-66b0-4701-8dfd-5ae1125f5afd} = True
                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                        • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0} = True
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 633be4fc-4688-c48b-1a27-db672afaa695Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0bf7392egf09ag46d6g8266gc487d60f804fText UUID: 2729e048-95ef-4890-8362-b15a0f666b46Show Once: True
                        • +
                          38.Gale: As my mother always says, 'if you can't find yourself in Waterdeep, you're not looking in the right mirror.'

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 116bec7e-45ed-5d44-e90f-f3b35c0f429dSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h02d572cdg8d35g4911gbdfbgd607b06bc55eText UUID: a742e6e0-346d-400d-8e71-e4f4cc275a51Timeline Phase Index: 146Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 116bec7e-45ed-5d44-e90f-f3b35c0f429dTimeline Phase Duration: 6.67sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • See Node 123 (Gale) I'm just glad you're happy there. When we met, our lives were rather different, and being here this evening... well, it reminds me how much has changed.
                      • +
                        160.Player: The feeling's mutual. I have a new life, with you by my side, and my parents close at hand... it's more than I could have ever dreamed of.ORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_SavedParentsShadowheart!Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Global
                        • ORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_SavedParents {486d69d4-a7c2-4cb5-8fcb-8f2cb738ada9} = True

                        • See Node 38 (Gale) As my mother always says, 'if you can't find yourself in Waterdeep, you're not looking in the right mirror.'
                      • +
                        251.Player: It's strange to start a new life when I didn't truly confront my old one, but I'm glad I'm with you.!ORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_KilledParents!ORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_SavedParentsShadowheart!Full-Illithid

                      • +
                        148.Player: I can serve the Coast from Waterdeep - and I can keep an eye on you while I'm at it.GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiersWyll!Full-Illithid

                        • +
                          249.Gale: Protective as ever, but fear not - my ambition now stretches only as far as getting my marking done in time for us to share a glass of zzar in the Yawning Portal.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7018d0a2-b196-542a-a272-0e68e344cc66Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hdd0d5833g9d66g4d88g946dgf7522a344365Text UUID: 6524dd9a-b2be-4eb4-ae72-754274fbfba9Timeline Phase Index: 32Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7018d0a2-b196-542a-a272-0e68e344cc66Timeline Phase Duration: 10.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • See Node 123 (Gale) I'm just glad you're happy there. When we met, our lives were rather different, and being here this evening... well, it reminds me how much has changed.
                      • +
                        365.Player: I miss Baldur's Gate - but I'm content to spend time in Waterdeep.!GLO_Wyll_State_GrandDuke!GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiers!GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfAvernusWyll!Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: aa9f6204-76dc-be0e-8413-847f77470065Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb91ea039gdadeg482ag9f60gbbbfa1635aafText UUID: d62cecfd-d1e9-4e9e-bea9-2157c63d7cd2Show Once: True
                        • •
                          440.Jump to Node 123

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: JumpUUID: cc78fd13-376a-6b3a-05c1-be34094d34d9Jump Target: Node 123 (34df5175-3437-aa76-390c-f044ca9fd54d)Jump Target Point: 1
                      • +
                        533.Player: I'm fond of the city - and its near-constant festivals. A welcome respite after a tenday of hunting.Lae'zel!Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                        • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5} = True
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f4d73014-6ac5-18dc-d241-b293927ffd7eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h521afe3ag137bg4f1dg8733g7e8fd7622e19Text UUID: a2d10102-c21f-4d59-b2f3-b0ecce7bfdc6Show Once: True
                        • See Node 440 Jump to Node 123
                      • +
                        542.Player: It's a fine thing - to be in a new place where I've never shed a drop of blood.Dark Urge!Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                        • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2} = True
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f7efa00c-a588-2fd1-8cd3-7f31afe24fa9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hdc132eb1g451dg40f1g8261g1837b42a446bText UUID: 11910b2b-6887-4f43-830c-cb44ddbf8a70Show Once: True
                        • +
                          488.Gale: Not a sentiment I can entirely relate to, but a fresh start is always good for the spirit.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e409691c-a6b6-2dd8-56c7-67f5175d8d2fSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: he18aa8e2g7fe2g4f76gb24ag79eb49751163Text UUID: e045f0f3-91c8-4aee-9001-e286a7961221Timeline Phase Index: 60Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e409691c-a6b6-2dd8-56c7-67f5175d8d2fTimeline Phase Duration: 7.29sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • See Node 123 (Gale) I'm just glad you're happy there. When we met, our lives were rather different, and being here this evening... well, it reminds me how much has changed.
                      • +
                        513.Player: Given the parts of it I'm forced to frequent, I'm surprised I've come to like it as I have.Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = True

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ecadf3df-2c7c-ac3c-15c5-2d200e688235Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4994076ag911dg41e6gbb0ag135db4129d70Text UUID: b75b27ef-1faf-462a-936a-a34a5d114956Show Once: True
                        • +
                          490.No Speaker: Alias to Node 123
                          • See Node 123 (Gale) I'm just glad you're happy there. When we met, our lives were rather different, and being here this evening... well, it reminds me how much has changed.
                      • +
                        382.Player: I only wish I were able to share more of it with you. But I'm content to be wherever you are.Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = True

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b37191cd-6404-b5ef-e85e-f869a12bc0cbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h975b2690g3ce7g4ea9gab78g848b30dfe8a3Text UUID: 214563a9-940d-42e1-85ea-1983857fe000Show Once: True
                        • •
                          501.Jump to Node 123

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: JumpUUID: e836f692-dac7-a93e-aad0-4a50d0fbab8cJump Target: Node 123 (34df5175-3437-aa76-390c-f044ca9fd54d)Jump Target Point: 1
                      • +
                        284.Player: It's more civilised than I'm used to. But the Field Ward has enough skulls worth cracking to keep me busy.BarbarianBardClericDruidRanger+8 more!Shadowheart!Full-Illithid

                        Flags and Tags

                        ruletagtype rule
                        • Barbarian {02913f9a-f696-40cf-acdf-32032afab32c}
                        • Bard {d93434bd-6b71-4789-b128-ee24156057cc}
                        • Cleric {1671b4bf-4f47-4bb7-9cb9-80bb1f6009d5}
                        • Druid {44ac4317-4d38-4d28-80e2-94024c6e42f0}
                        • Ranger {37a733c1-a862-4157-b92a-9cff46232c6a}
                        • Wizard {6fe3ae27-dc6c-4fc9-9245-710c790c396c}
                        • Sorcerer {18266c0b-efbc-4c80-8784-ada4a37218d7}
                        • Warlock {5804f55a-93f7-4281-9512-8d548a9e2a22}
                        • Paladin {6d85ab2d-5c23-498c-a61e-98f05a00177a}
                        • Oathbreaker {c7bdcdf2-15e7-456e-adf1-21dda3172e18}
                        • Rogue {f8a0608b-666c-4be6-a49c-03b369c10bd2}
                        • Monk {e1e460bb-d0ae-4452-8529-c9e176558731}
                        • Fighter {1ae7017c-4884-4a43-bc4a-742fa0d201c0}
                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                        • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0} = False
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                        Text

                        Variant 1

                        combine=0
                        • Barbarian
                        It's more civilised than I'm used to. But the Field Ward has enough skulls worth cracking to keep me busy.
                        h910a14fcga0feg48dcg8ed5gd0488ec31da5 | 005cc6f0-2817-47bf-9b64-156bb7dd9bd1 | stub

                        Variant 2

                        combine=0
                        • Bard
                        I love Waterdeep as much as its denizens love me. The Yawning Portal's never given such rapturous applause...
                        h69b0b4f0g6852g47a2ga546g4eeeb6282a12 | b82606bd-5136-4d5c-ac1c-5d2f57a7ffb8 | stub

                        Variant 3

                        combine=0
                        • Cleric
                        I've found great comfort in the Sea Ward's temples. Waterdeep brings me closer to my god, as well as to you.
                        h3ba46a55gdfb3g499bg9d19gd3c0f4a807c2 | d8373a39-264f-4a32-b9f1-29dd0250e425 | stub

                        Variant 4

                        combine=0
                        • Druid
                        • Ranger
                        I confess, I'm rarely at home in such cities. But the wilds outside the city are wonderful, as is coming home to you.
                        h87852a68g8611g424cg8059g03c9e4bd8309 | 99d583f5-2acf-4934-a602-d2c798b534a9 | stub

                        Variant 5

                        combine=0
                        • Wizard
                        The arcane institutions, the magical market places, the libraries. Waterdeep is truly a wizard's paradise.
                        h7bd2f3e1g2c0fg44c5g836eg4ab948adeaa6 | 7c0b0248-2197-4547-8613-2de35c6e7fdc | stub

                        Variant 6

                        combine=0
                        • Sorcerer
                        • Warlock
                        The institutions, the magical market places, the libraries. It's an arcanist's paradise.
                        h92c2e672gd4ceg4a92ga132g20601acd0e3f | 8e02e037-09fe-49f3-9465-78c9d7ca8b1b | stub

                        Variant 7

                        combine=0
                        • Paladin
                        • Oathbreaker
                        There are many wrongs to be righted in such a city. In time, I may yet change it for the better.
                        h3b3339f7g4b64g4647g9d39gc13186003722 | 0e5ecd68-45fb-4752-93e5-f18ef1add901 | stub

                        Variant 8

                        combine=0
                        • Rogue
                        And I share its spoils with you. The City of Splendours makes for some splendid thievery.
                        h3a013208g2058g419cg906eg92e57a6abe6a | c940f8ba-dc7e-47a9-99e8-ed4bdab64b99 | stub

                        Variant 9

                        combine=0
                        • Monk
                        I've learned much from its monastic orders. Even in the City of Splendours, focus and discipline can be found.
                        hf4bdf975g0902g49e7ga0aag40dc77a6b371 | a0ec7ede-bf47-4c20-8e08-403b57013f48 | stub

                        Variant 10

                        combine=0
                        • Fighter
                        Even the City of Splendours has its rough edges. I've enjoyed testing myself against them...
                        h423a6ab9g5304g4d71g89f4g20be31ef86b1 | 2cc1299b-261c-4d55-bfbc-5d3ae7a82762 | stub

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7abd89a5-4ec5-a7bf-43ab-4a391f170f9eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h910a14fcga0feg48dcg8ed5gd0488ec31da5Text 1 UUID: 005cc6f0-2817-47bf-9b64-156bb7dd9bd1Text 2 Handle: h69b0b4f0g6852g47a2ga546g4eeeb6282a12Text 2 UUID: b82606bd-5136-4d5c-ac1c-5d2f57a7ffb8Text 3 Handle: h3ba46a55gdfb3g499bg9d19gd3c0f4a807c2Text 3 UUID: d8373a39-264f-4a32-b9f1-29dd0250e425Text 4 Handle: h87852a68g8611g424cg8059g03c9e4bd8309Text 4 UUID: 99d583f5-2acf-4934-a602-d2c798b534a9Text 5 Handle: h7bd2f3e1g2c0fg44c5g836eg4ab948adeaa6Text 5 UUID: 7c0b0248-2197-4547-8613-2de35c6e7fdcText 6 Handle: h92c2e672gd4ceg4a92ga132g20601acd0e3fText 6 UUID: 8e02e037-09fe-49f3-9465-78c9d7ca8b1bText 7 Handle: h3b3339f7g4b64g4647g9d39gc13186003722Text 7 UUID: 0e5ecd68-45fb-4752-93e5-f18ef1add901Text 8 Handle: h3a013208g2058g419cg906eg92e57a6abe6aText 8 UUID: c940f8ba-dc7e-47a9-99e8-ed4bdab64b99Text 9 Handle: hf4bdf975g0902g49e7ga0aag40dc77a6b371Text 9 UUID: a0ec7ede-bf47-4c20-8e08-403b57013f48Text 10 Handle: h423a6ab9g5304g4d71g89f4g20be31ef86b1Text 10 UUID: 2cc1299b-261c-4d55-bfbc-5d3ae7a82762Show Once: True
                        • •
                          548.Jump to Node 123

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: JumpUUID: f9c4cafb-7802-7d88-dfcf-213e3e6f61ecJump Target: Node 123 (34df5175-3437-aa76-390c-f044ca9fd54d)Jump Target Point: 1
                • +
                  70.Gale: I confess, when I left Waterdeep there was a part of me afraid that I might regret my decision. But I never have.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 215e8841-0f43-b5de-5139-9a5c4b7f154aSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h038d5ea7g581cg4acdgb6b1ga1b5e30b5ca9Text UUID: 9a6dda10-3471-46b3-886b-8e6f24e4effeTimeline Phase Index: 105Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 215e8841-0f43-b5de-5139-9a5c4b7f154aTimeline Phase Duration: 10.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                  • +
                    392.Gale: I know our time together is rather snatched, but I assure you - it's also savoured. You remain very precious to me, as does everyone.ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_KilledParentsShadowheart

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Global
                    • ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_KilledParents {3a3b0ecf-a1ed-4733-8548-0348befc6bac} = True
                    checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                    • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b81c76e3-2737-445c-b4c2-a7f8baf55702Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h318b9891g99d4g4894ga079g41816db7af96Text UUID: 725e2ff5-bc70-42d0-9b73-026bd60e972dTimeline Phase Index: 83Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b81c76e3-2737-445c-b4c2-a7f8baf55702Timeline Phase Duration: 12.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • •
                      323.Jump to Node 173

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: JumpUUID: 8fbc0ec6-6ea3-d2c6-2ff0-c3d87b12a97dJump Target: Node 173 (4fc68191-2afb-5e2f-87ee-1cc895e0a31e)Jump Target Point: 1
                  • +
                    12.Gale: The chance to see life through your good eye, as well as my own - it's been everything I hoped it would be.One-Eyed

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                    • One-Eyed {8df7d133-21cb-4e8d-92dd-9ef9394fd2d1} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 05a579ee-ae01-67f7-c78e-babe73462f11Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hffbf7eaag829cg4dbfga8d3gbea9cda01fe3Text UUID: 0c5497f7-d2e6-4729-893f-f2edc35560b6Timeline Phase Index: 131Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 05a579ee-ae01-67f7-c78e-babe73462f11Timeline Phase Duration: 7.05sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • +
                      313.Gale: I'm delighted to be here amongst friends again, but part of me is reluctant to step away from our new life - even for such a gathering as this.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8a2cfa80-d90e-eb5e-2390-5de2515c21f3Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h12579d33g7be5g4c2bg857cg1e87f8f6094bText UUID: c36b5e04-717e-4dc7-bdf7-3bb9ccb4044cTimeline Phase Index: 11Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8a2cfa80-d90e-eb5e-2390-5de2515c21f3Timeline Phase Duration: 11.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • +
                        473.Player: I'm glad you've taken to life in Baldur's Gate so quickly. I thought you'd never leave Waterdeep...Full-IllithidORI_Gale_State_StayInBaldursGate

                        Flags and Tags

                        ruletagtype rule
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                        checktype Global
                        • ORI_Gale_State_StayInBaldursGate {9149f141-5d40-72e6-fc71-d0f7e343560c} = True

                        Text

                        Variant 1

                        combine=0
                        • Full-Illithid
                        I'm glad you've taken to life in Baldur's Gate so quickly. I thought you'd never leave Waterdeep...
                        hce229f00g3ec9g4f04g8492g04f38cb1e620 | e586c2c0-be6d-4656-a122-fd1084a59252 | stub

                        Variant 2

                        I'm glad you've taken to life in Baldur's Gate so quickly. I thought you'd never leave Waterdeep...
                        hc09baf5cg2878g4065gb7f8gb5f6c7e34976 | 4a4b767b-0ba7-45da-95ab-e63ab2be1360 | stub

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: de2aa483-56cc-6b03-b0c3-ced9d490cd8aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hce229f00g3ec9g4f04g8492g04f38cb1e620Text 1 UUID: e586c2c0-be6d-4656-a122-fd1084a59252Text 2 Handle: hc09baf5cg2878g4065gb7f8gb5f6c7e34976Text 2 UUID: 4a4b767b-0ba7-45da-95ab-e63ab2be1360Show Once: True
                        • +
                          201.Gale: I merely lacked the correct motivation, but even the City of Splendours itself fails to dazzle when set against your beauty.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5c1356d2-6a73-b3c6-3266-00a3e37635a7Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: he629b24bga37cg4deega6ecg6a313fff583dText UUID: 32a2e60b-0aff-4ca6-97fc-159d9e454f20Timeline Phase Index: 163Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5c1356d2-6a73-b3c6-3266-00a3e37635a7Timeline Phase Duration: 8.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • +
                            454.Speaker 2: I'm just glad I'm not the only one encouraging you to leave the library once in a while. It does one good to feel the grass beneath one's paws from time to time.8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922

                            Flags and Tags

                            checktype Script
                            • 8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922 = True

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d53f590c-e9c1-f78e-307f-79d2feed47b0Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: h8e36956ag2040g4339gb1ccgd44354971dd2Text UUID: 334644ad-7122-463f-a566-6f10d7ead1e9Timeline Phase Index: 77Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d53f590c-e9c1-f78e-307f-79d2feed47b0Timeline Phase Duration: 10.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                            • +
                              82.Gale: I don't know where to begin in telling people what we've been up to. I suspect they won't believe me...

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 250f6577-8f24-5a82-18c1-c125b7a657caSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: he96e8cebg595cg40e5g814agc48a84eaf7b8Text UUID: 0e9509e1-fc4c-4faa-88b0-f9ed10e5e545Timeline Phase Index: 110Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 250f6577-8f24-5a82-18c1-c125b7a657caTimeline Phase Duration: 7.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                              • +
                                331.Player: You've spent every moment not with me in your library, Gale. I suspect they'll believe you.Full-Illithid!ORI_Laezel_State_PlayerLaezelOrpheus!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell!Astarion

                                Flags and Tags

                                ruletagtype rule
                                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                                checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                • ORI_Laezel_State_PlayerLaezelOrpheus {9bbf4067-fcb1-0c74-088d-ff887ca2abe5} = False
                                checktype Object | speaker 0 Gale
                                • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = False
                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3} = False

                                Text

                                Variant 1

                                combine=0
                                • Full-Illithid
                                You've spent every moment not with me in your library, Gale. I suspect they'll believe you.
                                hb1b89640g5652g422cg8f53ge71f3088b1c9 | 7a3efe1c-55be-4d8e-854d-5ebf47651312 | stub

                                Variant 2

                                You've spent every moment not with me in your library, Gale. I suspect they'll believe you.
                                h3c4f8bd2g6814g4b3fg8decg02162f3016e7 | 7f7dacf2-a997-4bfa-80f4-a3655da40d9c | stub

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 920ce639-bee6-066b-ec54-2944ac334ddbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hb1b89640g5652g422cg8f53ge71f3088b1c9Text 1 UUID: 7a3efe1c-55be-4d8e-854d-5ebf47651312Text 2 Handle: h3c4f8bd2g6814g4b3fg8decg02162f3016e7Text 2 UUID: 7f7dacf2-a997-4bfa-80f4-a3655da40d9cShow Once: True
                                • +
                                  219.Gale: Aha! But only in the pursuit of other pleasures besides the study of magic. Writing, painting, a spot of knitting... I've never been so relaxed.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6421578b-484f-77dc-2ff3-7436555c60edSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h3d9dc652gc698g4a9ega353g715522c0e6f5Text UUID: fcbb8f31-e792-4c7e-80d4-72dbbe265769Timeline Phase Index: 170Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6421578b-484f-77dc-2ff3-7436555c60edTimeline Phase Duration: 13.88sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                  • +
                                    34.Gale: Our lives are certainly a far cry from the one I once pictured. Even now, with the orb's fires quelled by Mystra at last, I scarcely dare believe it.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 10ee12d5-5fc6-e571-df00-16c53dbf4ea7Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h873fd039g0c9dg45a1g8258g29cf7c60163fText UUID: 046c6e95-b196-46b2-a012-76d8fddceefcTimeline Phase Index: 143Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 10ee12d5-5fc6-e571-df00-16c53dbf4ea7Timeline Phase Duration: 37.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Group ID: 10ee12d5-5fc6-e571-df00-16c53dbf4ea7Group Index: 0
                                    • +
                                      424.Gale: Before we met I fear I was rather stuck in my ways. And stuck inside my tower with a world-shattering orb of magic sealed within my chest, to be fair to myself.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c38609c7-0830-12b4-05e3-7ca99d2cb5fdSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h74c6b5efgcec3g4b3fg848cg70a0547bfb3eText UUID: 7c928334-d696-467d-aebf-0f3e58463ccfGroup ID: 10ee12d5-5fc6-e571-df00-16c53dbf4ea7Group Index: 1
                                      • +
                                        472.Gale: I was afraid to so much as dream of a night like this. To hope that my life might amount to more than lonely, bitter disappointment. And then I found you.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dd26683c-5c38-49e8-bccd-81a3758dca92Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h222c48c3g506fg4c83g8445g02b3f0fe1eadText UUID: f0c84588-59ee-410d-bc8f-e0f151f9b173Group ID: 10ee12d5-5fc6-e571-df00-16c53dbf4ea7Group Index: 2
                                        • •
                                          147.Jump to Node 512

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: JumpUUID: 40d361c7-b78a-ebaf-6bd4-81f5d115ccb1Jump Target: Node 512 (ec82bc5c-3074-9910-7f4d-ace3bc8a27c5)Jump Target Point: 1
                              • +
                                221.Player: You've spent every moment not with me in your library, Gale. I suspect they'll believe you.Full-Illithid!ORI_Astarion_State_LeadSpawnInUnderdarkAstarion

                                Text

                                combine=0
                                • Full-Illithid
                                You've spent every moment not with me in your library, Gale. I suspect they'll believe you.
                                had042d91g27f8g4598g9c2dg82f261133c9c | bc66bda4-7b69-4d3c-b80b-efb048ef7945 | stub

                                Variant 2

                                You've spent every moment not with me in your library, Gale. I suspect they'll believe you.
                                h667c94d2g7071g4bdeg93a5gde5ed2001992 | d56e4231-8057-460f-9ce7-d9c013d9cd66 | stub

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6487b646-02fa-f88f-24c1-6f0bb932d4b5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: had042d91g27f8g4598g9c2dg82f261133c9cText 1 UUID: bc66bda4-7b69-4d3c-b80b-efb048ef7945Text 2 Handle: h667c94d2g7071g4bdeg93a5gde5ed2001992Text 2 UUID: d56e4231-8057-460f-9ce7-d9c013d9cd66
                                • See Node 219 (Gale) Aha! But only in the pursuit of other pleasures besides the study of magic. Writing, painting, a spot of knitting... I've never been so relaxed.
                              • +

                                • +
                                  222.Gale: Ahem. Well, the improvements I made to the High Hall alone should protect it from any passing Netherbrains for a millennia at least.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6498bdf4-153a-ace8-d69c-9d0584db0fcbSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h0ec36aa1ga6f9g4104gae88gbcedb85be2aaText UUID: c83a1dcf-3434-4946-bf8b-11d5a4a9dba6Timeline Phase Index: 107Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6498bdf4-153a-ace8-d69c-9d0584db0fcbTimeline Phase Duration: 14.09sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 6498bdf4-153a-ace8-d69c-9d0584db0fcbGroup Index: 0
                                  • +
                                    76.Gale: One can never have too many buttresses, after all.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2370bb29-036a-3b8d-2458-d3c75afc8339Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h193353aeg4d2dg45b1gacb9gc380b252e786Text UUID: a48fe892-24b8-4f20-9d16-c35c41a7d994Group ID: 6498bdf4-153a-ace8-d69c-9d0584db0fcbGroup Index: 1
                                    • See Node 34 (Gale) Our lives are certainly a far cry from the one I once pictured. Even now, with the orb's fires quelled by Mystra at last, I scarcely dare believe it.
                              • +

                                • +
                                  553.Gale: Just because we live in the Underdark doesn't mean we can't illuminate our days with the burning glow of knowledge.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fc64cd7e-00f3-b005-ecf7-9d3b72c5327eSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h16434caeg9997g4b6ag85b8g0fe351c0adb9Text UUID: 19bef1cc-3b58-42ed-8c69-ea69faa0b9adTimeline Phase Index: 151Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fc64cd7e-00f3-b005-ecf7-9d3b72c5327eTimeline Phase Duration: 17.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: fc64cd7e-00f3-b005-ecf7-9d3b72c5327eGroup Index: 0
                                  • +
                                    110.Gale: Not literally, of course - my books are not for burning. Even though some of them are inclined to combust spontaneously.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3136e53a-7345-e64c-97dd-0b4ed691ac78Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hcb4da416gce1bg4a23gab11g86761948fba4Text UUID: 2789b33e-db10-4383-be70-dbdba53a9099Group ID: fc64cd7e-00f3-b005-ecf7-9d3b72c5327eGroup Index: 1
                                    • See Node 34 (Gale) Our lives are certainly a far cry from the one I once pictured. Even now, with the orb's fires quelled by Mystra at last, I scarcely dare believe it.
                              • +
                                358.Player: Faced with a camp full of vampire spawn, the first thing you did was start a book club. Everyone will believe that.ORI_Astarion_State_LeadSpawnInUnderdarkAstarion

                                • +
                                  373.Gale: Now, you protest, but I'm certain I saw you lingering over a first edition of 'The Plane-Shifting Pit-Fiend.' A pity it was so flammable...

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b02e2bf6-ba73-98bc-fe1e-26811e98be47Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hfb7f1cf2g7f8dg4159gab47gd39c47d11ee4Text UUID: aa8d73bb-ef11-4ace-ad77-028723627bc6Timeline Phase Index: 52Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b02e2bf6-ba73-98bc-fe1e-26811e98be47Timeline Phase Duration: 12.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                • +
                                  439.Gale: Well, our love can hardly be confined to expression in the common tongue. Not when githyanki offers so many colourful alternatives.

                                • +
                                  300.Gale: Not me, of course. Gale of Waterdeep might have craved such attention, but Gale Dekarios does a heroic deed purely for its own quiet satisfaction. And the occasional hearty 'thank you.'

                                  Text

                                  Not me, of course. Gale of Waterdeep might have craved such attention, but Gale Dekarios does a heroic deed purely for its own quiet satisfaction. And the occasional hearty 'thank you.'
                                  h2e15d2b1gd070g4c78g92e2ga5916cc69be5 | bf547ba4-a63c-4468-b67b-a84be7373680 | stub

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 84f61cd3-f115-5346-a350-ddbabb611a05Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h2e15d2b1gd070g4c78g92e2ga5916cc69be5Text UUID: bf547ba4-a63c-4468-b67b-a84be7373680Timeline Phase Index: 28Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 84f61cd3-f115-5346-a350-ddbabb611a05Timeline Phase Duration: 16.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                  • See Node 463 Jump to Node 34
                              • +
                                496.Player: Who knew you'd look so good swinging an axe...BarbarianBardClericCleric of MystraDruid+8 more!Full-Illithid

                                Flags and Tags

                                ruletagtype rule
                                • Barbarian {02913f9a-f696-40cf-acdf-32032afab32c}
                                • Bard {d93434bd-6b71-4789-b128-ee24156057cc}
                                • Cleric {1671b4bf-4f47-4bb7-9cb9-80bb1f6009d5}
                                • Cleric of Mystra {90de46bd-9f0c-4c2f-9505-56063b31b360}
                                • Druid {44ac4317-4d38-4d28-80e2-94024c6e42f0}
                                • Sorcerer {18266c0b-efbc-4c80-8784-ada4a37218d7}
                                • Warlock {5804f55a-93f7-4281-9512-8d548a9e2a22}
                                • Wizard {6fe3ae27-dc6c-4fc9-9245-710c790c396c}
                                • Paladin {6d85ab2d-5c23-498c-a61e-98f05a00177a}
                                • Rogue {f8a0608b-666c-4be6-a49c-03b369c10bd2}
                                • Ranger {37a733c1-a862-4157-b92a-9cff46232c6a}
                                • Monk {e1e460bb-d0ae-4452-8529-c9e176558731}
                                • Fighter {1ae7017c-4884-4a43-bc4a-742fa0d201c0}
                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                Text

                                Variant 1

                                combine=0
                                • Barbarian
                                Who knew you'd look so good swinging an axe...
                                hd7032a1egadcdg45fagbde4g6f6d6b44cbbf | a7294cf9-170f-4d5f-b98e-7b52c649bace | stub

                                Variant 2

                                combine=0
                                • Bard
                                You've learned to harmonise wonderfully. Not quite solo material yet, but you're close.
                                h7beed64dg2a64g4beeg8db9g6f225400b895 | 4ccc6997-cf9f-46f2-b4fa-8cfac2d2c25a | stub

                                Variant 3

                                combine=0
                                • Cleric
                                • Cleric of Mystra
                                Me neither. You've learned much about my faith, and a far more worthy god than Mystra...
                                h51943402gc1b2g45a5g9016gf8f5a6c2f7ea | 21dfcf8f-dfbc-494a-9f3f-1b0b9b49ace5 | stub

                                Variant 4

                                combine=0
                                • Druid
                                I wouldn't have believed it either. I'd no idea you had such a way with animals...
                                h4bb02f61g8294g4b31g86fbg614b8cf91e4a | 477be0be-c07c-4eaa-9849-89c94e6cc69e | stub

                                Variant 5

                                combine=0
                                • Sorcerer
                                • Warlock
                                • Wizard
                                I wouldn't have believed it either. You, taking lessons in magic from me...
                                h1a423ed2g1605g4d8agb05ag6f285d413437 | c9b71848-ef40-494a-8bc5-99c578dab39f | stub

                                Variant 6

                                combine=0
                                • Paladin
                                Their belief does not matter. You've studied my oath, learned the truth of its purpose - that's achievement enough.
                                h41115a86g68a4g4414gab18gd7c9084d8b69 | fa16265f-95c0-4740-bc8b-64de7a1d0380 | stub

                                Variant 7

                                combine=0
                                • Rogue
                                That you've learned a trick or two from me? Steal the gold from their palms and they'll believe you soon enough.
                                ha077e819g41b8g439dg97a8g8350f426a814 | bf4448e4-5d93-43dd-91ee-9c5983d828a5 | stub

                                Variant 8

                                combine=0
                                • Ranger
                                Of course they'll believe you. Your arrows fly as true as your spells these days.
                                hc6c8c0e6g0dd6g418ag979cg861704667931 | 6c61f1ae-ee4c-4080-8364-d37c5d03508f | stub

                                Variant 9

                                combine=0
                                • Monk
                                Whether they believe does not matter. Our studies grant you an inner peace no external approval could offer.
                                hb4882d73gb251g4a43ga9adgdc8abb221829 | 070c5080-75a6-4d36-819d-a650a2c78911 | stub

                                Variant 10

                                combine=0
                                • Fighter
                                They'll believe it the next time we get ourselves into a scrap. You wield a sword as well as half the fighters in Faerûn.
                                h48099641g5295g4ddbga7c8g34338904c546 | 39ecc88e-c318-44b6-b88c-10c778b2ffa8 | stub

                                Variant 11

                                combine=0
                                • Cleric of Mystra
                                Only Mystra herself need know the truth of your accomplishments. And under my guidance, you've served her well.
                                hefdce963g7643g40a6g9d33gf15afecfef58 | 693a5866-b466-4c44-8827-34ec7bfe4b59 | stub

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e6ab578c-5c1c-b571-c894-d8db50334826Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hd7032a1egadcdg45fagbde4g6f6d6b44cbbfText 1 UUID: a7294cf9-170f-4d5f-b98e-7b52c649baceText 2 Handle: h7beed64dg2a64g4beeg8db9g6f225400b895Text 2 UUID: 4ccc6997-cf9f-46f2-b4fa-8cfac2d2c25aText 3 Handle: h51943402gc1b2g45a5g9016gf8f5a6c2f7eaText 3 UUID: 21dfcf8f-dfbc-494a-9f3f-1b0b9b49ace5Text 4 Handle: h4bb02f61g8294g4b31g86fbg614b8cf91e4aText 4 UUID: 477be0be-c07c-4eaa-9849-89c94e6cc69eText 5 Handle: h1a423ed2g1605g4d8agb05ag6f285d413437Text 5 UUID: c9b71848-ef40-494a-8bc5-99c578dab39fText 6 Handle: h41115a86g68a4g4414gab18gd7c9084d8b69Text 6 UUID: fa16265f-95c0-4740-bc8b-64de7a1d0380Text 7 Handle: ha077e819g41b8g439dg97a8g8350f426a814Text 7 UUID: bf4448e4-5d93-43dd-91ee-9c5983d828a5Text 8 Handle: hc6c8c0e6g0dd6g418ag979cg861704667931Text 8 UUID: 6c61f1ae-ee4c-4080-8364-d37c5d03508fText 9 Handle: hb4882d73gb251g4a43ga9adgdc8abb221829Text 9 UUID: 070c5080-75a6-4d36-819d-a650a2c78911Text 10 Handle: h48099641g5295g4ddbga7c8g34338904c546Text 10 UUID: 39ecc88e-c318-44b6-b88c-10c778b2ffa8Text 11 Handle: hefdce963g7643g40a6g9d33gf15afecfef58Text 11 UUID: 693a5866-b466-4c44-8827-34ec7bfe4b59Show Once: True
                                • +
                                  136.Gale: What can I say? You're an excellent teacher.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3c393fe9-96d1-2c3a-6fa8-450793a0171cSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h11597753g0dc7g4ab9g8427g78ad68c95b04Text UUID: 90af0128-e6d7-42e0-b7f1-d267fe5ce91fTimeline Phase Index: 178Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3c393fe9-96d1-2c3a-6fa8-450793a0171cTimeline Phase Duration: 4.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
