                      • +
                        295.Player: I'm just glad of a night off from the ever-present threat of danger and death.Full-Illithid!ORI_Gale_State_StayInBaldursGate

                        Flags and Tags

                        ruletagtype rule
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                        checktype Global
                        • ORI_Gale_State_StayInBaldursGate {9149f141-5d40-72e6-fc71-d0f7e343560c} = False

                        Text

                        Variant 1

                        combine=0
                        • Full-Illithid
                        I'm just glad of a night off from the ever-present threat of danger and death.
                        h264f28afgd8d4g49d2g806fg0229bd0c685a | da48232f-7d2e-44fe-92db-16831d2e9e3f | stub

                        Variant 2

                        I'm just glad of a night off from the ever-present threat of danger and death.
                        h7fbf20bdgea08g4a15g8defg59f4bb857af9 | bba5ab86-e612-4170-96dc-0768453d7473 | stub

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 824adb32-4c02-d645-0be5-dd89d51a7717Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h264f28afgd8d4g49d2g806fg0229bd0c685aText 1 UUID: da48232f-7d2e-44fe-92db-16831d2e9e3fText 2 Handle: h7fbf20bdgea08g4a15g8defg59f4bb857af9Text 2 UUID: bba5ab86-e612-4170-96dc-0768453d7473Show Once: True
                        • +
                          179.Gale: Come now - our adventures have offered far more than the potential for destruction. I have enough looted literature to fill a dozen libraries.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 51ede3af-8c37-1896-5a7d-ca94ee4f9517Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h839b00e6g843fg4acdgbdb3g4264bb7119ecText UUID: ea525352-b8a9-401d-807f-09891082db72Timeline Phase Index: 174Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 51ede3af-8c37-1896-5a7d-ca94ee4f9517Timeline Phase Duration: 9.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • See Node 454 (Speaker 2) I'm just glad I'm not the only one encouraging you to leave the library once in a while. It does one good to feel the grass beneath one's paws from time to time.
                      • +
                        301.Player: Don't worry - your books will still be waiting for us when we get home.Full-IllithidORI_Gale_State_StayInBaldursGate!Karlach

                          14.Gale: Oh, ignore me - I'm perfectly content. Besides, the chance to step out for a night on your arm is hardly one I'm going to pass up.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 064a0d08-232f-1581-7f88-621c9cc07ec3Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hf271345agf887g45a2gb3d4gda19abc1c78aText UUID: 894451e2-bede-428d-9117-f3d4c298bcddTimeline Phase Index: 133Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 064a0d08-232f-1581-7f88-621c9cc07ec3Timeline Phase Duration: 12.42sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                          • See Node 454 (Speaker 2) I'm just glad I'm not the only one encouraging you to leave the library once in a while. It does one good to feel the grass beneath one's paws from time to time.
                      • +

                        268.Player: It's thanks to what we shared with these old friends that we have a future in the first place. Let's savour the moment.Full-IllithidORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_KilledParentsShadowheart

                        Flags and Tags

                        ruletagtype rule
                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                        checktype Global
                        • ORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_KilledParents {e9060caf-66b0-4701-8dfd-5ae1125f5afd} = True
                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                        • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0} = True

                        Text

                        Variant 1

                        combine=0
                        • Full-Illithid
                        It's thanks to what we shared with these old friends that we have a future in the first place. Let's savour the moment.
                        hebe6e145gafdfg4e93g85acgef0619c57040 | 2810391e-7e67-489b-b87d-3c06e84e54eb | stub

                        Variant 2

                        It's thanks to what we shared with these old friends that we have a future in the first place. Let's savour the moment.
                        h53941b8fg072dg4b10g86a2g769d55f604f7 | 68c07a92-9af3-4ff7-9769-1aa470872a5c | stub

                        • +
                          114.Gale: Quite right. Good food, good wine, and excellent company. What more could we ask for?

                          Metadata

                          339.Gale: Given the rest of the guest list, I'd say you're not the only one. Thankfully, your temptations tonight can be indulged - good food, good wine, and excellent company.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9817a833-3121-4d0a-d257-fb9bc0614405Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h9407c3e1g70bfg4cbcgaaafg7d3f83fcc79aText UUID: 89cb533c-14e5-442a-8e87-94540de735cfTimeline Phase Index: 16Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9817a833-3121-4d0a-d257-fb9bc0614405Timeline Phase Duration: 10.44sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • See Node 156 Jump to Node 454
                  • +
                    525.Gale: The chance to see life through your eyes, as well as my own - it's been everything I hoped it would be.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f018cc52-adeb-2cda-a71a-4e77b72e9479Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h5e3fa0c4g90f2g48edg93ebg05d0064598fbText UUID: 085695a1-e9f7-4b2c-84de-0b946164dd31Timeline Phase Index: 67Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f018cc52-adeb-2cda-a71a-4e77b72e9479Timeline Phase Duration: 7.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • See Node 313 (Gale) I'm delighted to be here amongst friends again, but part of me is reluctant to step away from our new life - even for such a gathering as this.
      • +

          • +
            521.Speaker 2: Oh, don't mind me. I'm only your oldest friend and your mother's most voluble confidant. Do whatever you please, I don't mind!

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ee1f414a-c8a0-8bc0-591e-73a64785265fSpeaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: h76309413g41eag4863ga2fbgb05735c2cd17Text UUID: bd9da16e-f9f2-49f8-8ea9-d29b1e544d85Group ID: d81780ca-3365-1989-4ca2-0f79cfc31128Group Index: 1
            • See Node 419 (Gale) I won't keep you to myself for too long, but while I have you - I want to say thank you for encouraging me to attend this evening.
        • +
          416.Gale: I'm not entirely certain that would fall under the definition of 'smart casual', but I'll be sure to indulge you when we get home...

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c144c3c4-cb91-81f6-9326-81e852d85804Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h0d8db7d9g9b87g4d40gaa11g5fac6e64b817Text UUID: af724b07-efc4-4ddc-8f68-57fa2b867446Timeline Phase Index: 91Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c144c3c4-cb91-81f6-9326-81e852d85804Timeline Phase Duration: 11.54sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

            405.Speaker 2: No harm in taking pride in your appearance, Mr Dekarios. Though I do so wish you'd take more pride in that chin of yours.8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Script
            • 8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922 = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bd96b402-4b4d-4557-68c8-e722358842a9Speaker: 2 (Speaker 2)Text Handle: hea7a393eg0e85g47aag80a2g325087bffc30Text UUID: c9eb3c5a-9a7d-40d4-848b-d8996dbaf69fTimeline Phase Index: 85Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bd96b402-4b4d-4557-68c8-e722358842a9Timeline Phase Duration: 10.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Optional: True
            • See Node 419 (Gale) I won't keep you to myself for too long, but while I have you - I want to say thank you for encouraging me to attend this evening.
        • +
          369.Gale: Well, I didn't want you showing up with an ink-stained professor on your arm. Not in such esteemed company.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ad94f8eb-1975-354d-56b9-7dd94ce79833Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h81f191a1gb90ag4049g908eg46f2fe8b1141Text UUID: 87f99dbf-5565-44e3-8048-3523d94ca99cTimeline Phase Index: 76Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ad94f8eb-1975-354d-56b9-7dd94ce79833Timeline Phase Duration: 7.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • See Node 405 (Speaker 2) No harm in taking pride in your appearance, Mr Dekarios. Though I do so wish you'd take more pride in that chin of yours.
      • +

      44.Gale: You look well. A little singed around the edges, but well.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 14421388-6449-c702-f37d-b96cdbd5d387Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hc6090b15gdfbcg45f9gbe8ege6fd402bd5cdText UUID: eac13386-1970-4f62-ba64-153a7cc0059eTimeline Phase Index: 127Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 14421388-6449-c702-f37d-b96cdbd5d387Timeline Phase Duration: 6.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
      • See Node 3 (Gale) I wasn't sure I'd ever see you again. I'm not sure where to begin...

      189.Gale: Professor Gale Dekarios of Blackstaff Academy, educator of the esteemed School of Illusion. A pleasure to remake your acquaintance.note: Nodding/small bow in greeting to the player, pretending to be formal but delighted to see them

          • +
            342.Gale: Well, that was quite lovely. I'm glad you're as pleased to see me as I am you.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 99e96e06-ac43-f82a-f184-119924222760Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h3dca74abga507g4413g838fg5d7ec08a0a44Text UUID: fb7c557a-4056-4238-ad16-343ca361554cTimeline Phase Index: 17Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 99e96e06-ac43-f82a-f184-119924222760Timeline Phase Duration: 6.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • +
              178.Gale: I have to say, I'm quite grateful to just be 'Gale' for the evening.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 50d46d2c-5a86-45e8-4409-b639ab85e02dSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h5bfe54f4g085fg453cga2bdgdf26852b53a4Text UUID: ec3807d4-f0d7-40da-b397-a9bf2994bbc2Timeline Phase Index: 181Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 50d46d2c-5a86-45e8-4409-b639ab85e02dTimeline Phase Duration: 6.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • +
                16.Gale: I fear my students find me somewhat intimidating, due to my erm, explosive former reputation. I seem to put the fear of the gods into them.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0759c964-239c-b401-4ac6-79fbcf6ed5ffSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h9242a159g52f5g412cg9389g6ee24a96f977Text UUID: 4dbe2582-2853-4ab1-91a3-26d750ea25acTimeline Phase Index: 135Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0759c964-239c-b401-4ac6-79fbcf6ed5ffTimeline Phase Duration: 16.06sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 0759c964-239c-b401-4ac6-79fbcf6ed5ffGroup Index: 0
                • +
                  63.Gale: Or the fear of Mystra, to be more specific.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1d4fc710-8916-edd4-3515-fedd9a682155Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hb085f44dgcf4fg4163gabbfg25589c2882b2Text UUID: 74b42865-0e18-4abf-9ab2-d510ca696310Group ID: 0759c964-239c-b401-4ac6-79fbcf6ed5ffGroup Index: 1
                  • +
                    540.Gale: I surrendered the Crown of Karsus to her, as I told you I would. And in return, she cured me of the orb at last.ORI_Gale_Event_GaveCrownToMystra!ORI_Gale_Event_LeftCrown

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Global
                    • ORI_Gale_Event_GaveCrownToMystra {3375fd8b-4958-421d-2d51-ff9af5beaaa0} = True
                    • ORI_Gale_Event_LeftCrown {1662925d-ec3b-54cb-a1cf-6639c6fa90ce} = False

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f702b719-2e70-b648-00d4-dc12f4a84e3aSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hc6022877g3f0fg4469g8234g08cb0986a386Text UUID: e376d511-5c5c-49cb-a2aa-d2ee8659124eTimeline Phase Index: 25Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f702b719-2e70-b648-00d4-dc12f4a84e3aTimeline Phase Duration: 34.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: f702b719-2e70-b648-00d4-dc12f4a84e3aGroup Index: 0
                    • +
                      307.Gale: Even now, I struggle to put the feeling into words. It was like exhaling for the first time, after holding my breath for so very long.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8816bb8f-c075-a173-67df-45be65a0e62dSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: ha5c21f43g9f9cg4c80g8e56g851c476530c5Text UUID: 90ceaf09-ddcd-486f-b04b-733619e4ec9eGroup ID: f702b719-2e70-b648-00d4-dc12f4a84e3aGroup Index: 1
                      • +
                        414.Gale: Of course, I haven't clarified with my students that the orb is no longer a threat. The legend of my explosive capabilities is an excellent means of controlling a classroom. Too good, if anything.

                        Text

                        Of course, I haven't clarified with my students that the orb is no longer a threat. The legend of my explosive capabilities is an excellent means of controlling a classroom. Too good, if anything.
                        ha1a500ecg7e31g4a05ga9fdg4e075045bbd2 | 7aa87aff-4a95-41f1-b1bb-95ad4d1ac9fa | stub

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c023841a-713a-c4e0-9f2f-7e04b412de09Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: ha1a500ecg7e31g4a05ga9fdg4e075045bbd2Text UUID: 7aa87aff-4a95-41f1-b1bb-95ad4d1ac9faGroup ID: f702b719-2e70-b648-00d4-dc12f4a84e3aGroup Index: 2
                        • +
                          97.Gale: I spend most of my time trying to convince them how much fun the study of magic can be, but it'd be easier to crack a smile on an intellect devourer than some of my pupils...

                          Text

                          I spend most of my time trying to convince them how much fun the study of magic can be, but it'd be easier to crack a smile on an intellect devourer than some of my pupils...
                          hffe9355egdc4eg4234gba19gaf65311a159d | b64cf889-4eb0-42e3-8a6d-ffe818f511c8 | stub

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2be05da1-5ee3-6dde-7a63-7b8f28aae0c7Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hffe9355egdc4eg4234gba19gaf65311a159dText UUID: b64cf889-4eb0-42e3-8a6d-ffe818f511c8Timeline Phase Index: 117Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2be05da1-5ee3-6dde-7a63-7b8f28aae0c7Timeline Phase Duration: 13.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                          • +
                            409.Player: Or on a mind flayer, perhaps...Full-Illithid

                            Flags and Tags

                            • +
                              84.Gale: Smiling may no longer come easy to you, but I've seen how your tentacles twitch at my jokes. Even the ones I'm not entirely certain I was trying to make...

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2565c6d8-23cb-63a1-156b-40ec7519c3eaSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hd01d3ef8g2461g49ffgb49ag9dbe0bd944e9Text UUID: 15ca8fc7-5880-4c53-98bd-d73c81e46f7dTimeline Phase Index: 111Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2565c6d8-23cb-63a1-156b-40ec7519c3eaTimeline Phase Duration: 10.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                              • +
                                363.Gale: Still, I hoped my students might be a little more open to the playful side of such magic.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a7f0bfe7-dcda-0a0e-ac60-419c155acfcaSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h1252b9fega126g4785g9997g1fc86a6ac355Text UUID: df23c9e7-f1b2-424f-a6f4-ea14e667cc70Timeline Phase Index: 51Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a7f0bfe7-dcda-0a0e-ac60-419c155acfcaTimeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                              223.Gale: Ah, so you still remember our little lesson?

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 64b3eea3-bc2b-fae3-0503-19fadf87aca7Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h6198bad1g891fg40b7g87bdge7765d658e49Text UUID: b88dea61-e6da-4c08-beaf-f180e717c693Timeline Phase Index: 171Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 64b3eea3-bc2b-fae3-0503-19fadf87aca7Timeline Phase Duration: 5.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                              • +
                                352.Gale: As I recall, you had a very... active imagination, shall we say.CAMP_Gale_CRD_SpellTeaching_Pictured_Spike

                                • +
                                  2.Gale: You were, of course, indulging me in submitting to such a lesson. 'Teaching' you was hardly an effort at all. Not like my present cohort of apprentices.BardDruidSorcererWarlockWizard

                                    257.Gale: They try their best, of course - when they can manage to stay awake.

                                • See Node 2 (Gale) You were, of course, indulging me in submitting to such a lesson. 'Teaching' you was hardly an effort at all. Not like my present cohort of apprentices.
                              • +
                                247.Gale: It was at that moment, the Weave connecting us, that I realised how much your friendship had come to mean to me. As it still does.CAMP_Gale_SpellTeaching_Success

                                Flags and Tags

                                checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                • CAMP_Gale_SpellTeaching_Success {0c69d681-ca5c-0f03-fff9-a14c9374da95} = True

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6f9638e8-ca7b-3fc8-d870-e4c76194c2a0Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hd2da20bdgfadfg46f5g9fe1gfcb065a388eeText UUID: 7645df02-1784-4b39-b94a-ce5c4c769288Timeline Phase Index: 31Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6f9638e8-ca7b-3fc8-d870-e4c76194c2a0Timeline Phase Duration: 9.65sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                • See Node 2 (Gale) You were, of course, indulging me in submitting to such a lesson. 'Teaching' you was hardly an effort at all. Not like my present cohort of apprentices.
                              • +
                                187.Gale: A pity we can't repeat it now - I'm quite certain you'd pass with flying colours. If nothing else, you'd give it more enthusiasm than some of my current apprentices.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 55a64140-bcf0-e07f-463f-f462bd61d9a6Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h3fac462eg22fcg41f8gbbb8g6b0ad1677cbcText UUID: 4f832f6a-8759-4a0d-b5fb-e870e222e23cTimeline Phase Index: 155Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 55a64140-bcf0-e07f-463f-f462bd61d9a6Timeline Phase Duration: 13.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                • See Node 257 (Gale) They try their best, of course - when they can manage to stay awake.
                          • +
                            500.Player: Perhaps that's a good thing. I'm sure they're far better students than I was...Full-Illithid!CAMP_Gale_SpellTeaching_SuccessCAMP_Gale_SpellTeaching_Attempted

                            62.Player: Go on then - convince me. Why is illusory magic so much fun?Full-Illithid!e8bea07f-9f7a-35b5-11ca-f98ee9a801e8_GaleMentionedIllusion

                            Go on then - convince me. Why is illusory magic so much fun?

                            Variant 2

                            Go on then - convince me. Why is illusory magic so much fun?

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1b71bb5e-883a-2d04-5adb-85319435dda6Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hcf21da4bg2323g48cdg8e28g0b0171bd5c1cText 1 UUID: bb8c61cc-2803-49cf-a6fa-b4e38a0167d4Text 2 Handle: ha0fd5e49g65e0g47ccg90e9ga509caece205Text 2 UUID: bc14b129-5380-4b8f-af05-6d84ec9d9bb5Show Once: True
                            • +
                              524.Gale: Illusory magic has the power to confound the senses, to render the impossible into reality, and to allow expression of that most magical attribute of all - imagination.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef8ff3d6-fbf4-fc3b-c79a-6a5e87b98d47Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h95d31085gd8f3g4277g89dcgc6f56ebd9bc3Text UUID: 09c85e89-d240-45e5-935d-86593673d1fcTimeline Phase Index: 66Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ef8ff3d6-fbf4-fc3b-c79a-6a5e87b98d47Timeline Phase Duration: 17.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                              • +
                                465.Gale: Of course, I need not sell you on the virtues of such spellcasting. It lies well within your field of expertise, as you demonstrated to me.BardClericSorcererWarlockWizardCAMP_Gale_SpellTeaching_Success

                                Flags and Tags

                                ruletagtype rule
                                • Bard {d93434bd-6b71-4789-b128-ee24156057cc}
                                • Cleric {1671b4bf-4f47-4bb7-9cb9-80bb1f6009d5}
                                • Sorcerer {18266c0b-efbc-4c80-8784-ada4a37218d7}
                                • Warlock {5804f55a-93f7-4281-9512-8d548a9e2a22}
                                • Wizard {6fe3ae27-dc6c-4fc9-9245-710c790c396c}
                                checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                • CAMP_Gale_SpellTeaching_Success {0c69d681-ca5c-0f03-fff9-a14c9374da95} = True

                                Text

                                Variant 1

                                combine=0
                                • Bard
                                • Cleric
                                • Sorcerer
                                • Warlock
                                • Wizard
                                Of course, I need not sell you on the virtues of such spellcasting. It lies well within your field of expertise, as you demonstrated to me.
                                h6b874386g0d42g4d99g94e6g37182b41c91a | 8db5db1e-b7c4-4768-9cf1-7406dd124d1f | stub

                                Variant 2

                                Had you the decades to spare, I think you'd prove quite adept at it, as you did in that first lesson I taught you.
                                h2e37b3dfg639ag40ecga6bag9c0ceb3f4c5f | e4292634-ca1a-4cfb-9270-31eff9b75203 | stub

                                Metadata

                          • +
                            398.Player: It is a pity to imagine you chained to a desk. You wouldn't rather be out adventuring?Full-Illithid

                            Flags and Tags

                            ruletagtype rule
                            • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                            Text

                            Variant 1

                            combine=0
                            • Full-Illithid
                            It is a pity to imagine you chained to a desk. You wouldn't rather be out adventuring?
                            h534379f0ga6fdg43f8ga7cdg9abe67c952c0 | 5b0535bc-2d00-446b-bf95-234f0dcffb03 | stub

                            Variant 2

                            Sounds dull as old brass. Wouldn't you rather be out on another adventure?
                            he45cc887g692eg4e49g9c55g4cfedca1bf5a | aa151181-bb47-42b3-9202-09d971b80cbc | stub

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: baac87ac-0711-6b86-9f37-8c38bb7a1265Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h534379f0ga6fdg43f8ga7cdg9abe67c952c0Text 1 UUID: 5b0535bc-2d00-446b-bf95-234f0dcffb03Text 2 Handle: he45cc887g692eg4e49g9c55g4cfedca1bf5aText 2 UUID: aa151181-bb47-42b3-9202-09d971b80cbcShow Once: True
                            • +
                              113.Gale: I confess, sometimes while marking a student's fifth attempt at explaining the principles of illusory materialization, the thought occurs to me...

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 323bea32-a36b-bfa2-4198-bb12acca1633Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hc4fd5c85g8702g4f1egb69fgfdf5a8f23e3fText UUID: 362d4581-1958-4c2f-b31c-62d8db61cef3Timeline Phase Index: 123Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 323bea32-a36b-bfa2-4198-bb12acca1633Timeline Phase Duration: 12.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                              • +
                                203.Gale: In fact, I've actually been considering writing down the story of our adventures. The true tale of our flawed but ultimately endearing troupe, and the trials and tribulations we overcame.

                                Text

                                In fact, I've actually been considering writing down the story of our adventures. The true tale of our flawed but ultimately endearing troupe, and the trials and tribulations we overcame.
                                h3ef783fbgdcc2g4a50g9097g82a3e357b1a7 | c5b12505-43d7-466f-ad38-699a909d488e | stub

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5d712bb7-ddc1-d18a-2d08-342c7d4ed6f7Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h3ef783fbgdcc2g4a50g9097g82a3e357b1a7Text UUID: c5b12505-43d7-466f-ad38-699a909d488eTimeline Phase Index: 173Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5d712bb7-ddc1-d18a-2d08-342c7d4ed6f7Timeline Phase Duration: 14.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                • +
                                  61.Gale: I can hardly leave it to the likes of Volo to give a true account of our adventures. And no one would believe him if he did.EPI_Epilogue_State_VoloPresent

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  checktype Global
                                  • EPI_Epilogue_State_VoloPresent {d0b1685b-3f6b-4b83-a8c3-b72d6d6e7bcb} = True

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1a52fd70-cc91-4d40-71da-0300a76f4b95Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h788f7835g3583g4fd2g9e2fgb9f0ae74fc1cText UUID: 8d1e4c88-5bc3-4077-a193-936c44ea536cTimeline Phase Index: 125Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1a52fd70-cc91-4d40-71da-0300a76f4b95Timeline Phase Duration: 7.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                  • +
                                    18.Speaker 2: That odious man truly frizzles my whiskers. 'Long-haired miniature dragon,' he calls me. 'Tressym' is much less of a mouthful.EPI_Epilogue_State_VoloPresent8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922

                                    Flags and Tags

                                    checktype Global

                                    • +
                                      144.Gale: And what of you? What are you making of this new-found lease of life we earned?

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3fbc936c-4599-edeb-35a9-cb8b96927858Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hf54d11abg0194g4990gb878ga126872861f0Text UUID: e711a2bf-7fe0-4997-9e53-98d8e773b909Timeline Phase Index: 176Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3fbc936c-4599-edeb-35a9-cb8b96927858Timeline Phase Duration: 6.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                      • +
                                        56.Player: The war against Vlaakith is a bloody one, but there's talk of an alliance with the githzerai.Full-IllithidEPI_Epilogue_State_IsHologramEND_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedGale

                                        combine=0

                                        • +
                                          20.Gale: That would be a welcome twist in the tale. The more who fight by your side against Vlaakith, the better - though you don't need the help, of course.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 08234204-5797-9f28-57f9-38f8ba2dee63Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h91a3eedega1c1g47efgac91g1ccac1a8617dText UUID: 7b92ef78-ec1c-4083-9f3f-6e2d29e4aa4dTimeline Phase Index: 139Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 08234204-5797-9f28-57f9-38f8ba2dee63Timeline Phase Duration: 8.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                      • +
                                        475.Player: I confess, I've found life a little too quiet since our journey came to an end...Full-Illithid

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: deb0c74f-5e20-04a7-1991-60ac8844b359Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hfddc8a6agd036g4f6bg8aa9gb53e96cc5b12Text 1 UUID: 02675fdb-1b75-45e7-a7ee-e8db6bb48d58Text 2 Handle: h180e2e8eg3b05g45b6g8a9cgf3391ea40f7bText 2 UUID: 6e94e675-ed6a-47e5-9465-168a569022f9Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          483.Gale: Quiet is not always peace - that much I can vouch for. But in your case - I think you deserve a moment's rest.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e1b004a4-cb6a-202c-a86c-0563b21d6540Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hd2348868gc1bfg40d2g9db2gf75689e86863Text UUID: 1973a3d8-5ca1-4633-899b-32859657d57eTimeline Phase Index: 59Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e1b004a4-cb6a-202c-a86c-0563b21d6540Timeline Phase Duration: 9.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • +
                                            443.Gale: I've told my students plenty of tales about our escapades. You're something of a hero to them, you know.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cf9634a8-06a7-17a3-84fc-21f7f7249c0cSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hef052158gea23g49ebg827bga686e366cb3cText UUID: 4255fae8-0351-493f-9396-7e3d9c22e493Timeline Phase Index: 99Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cf9634a8-06a7-17a3-84fc-21f7f7249c0cTimeline Phase Duration: 6.85sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                            • +
                                              350.Gale: I'd be delighted to introduce you to them when you return. That is, if you wish to return to Faerûn. Or to me...ORI_Gale_State_ReturnedToWaterdeep!ORI_State_PartneredWithGaleEPI_Epilogue_State_IsHologramEND_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedGale

                                              • +
                                                316.Player: I want nothing more, Gale. When the Blood War is over, I'm coming home to you.Full-Illithid!EPI_Epilogue_State_IsHologram

                                                • +
                                                  375.Gale: I'm glad to hear that. And I promise - when that day comes, our home will be ready for you.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1af01f1-1ad1-aaab-fb17-a1da0bc1daf2Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: heb4633degde62g4da8g847bgbc8b6441f75fText UUID: ca4c982c-7304-4044-b4f6-85bbf37ad555Timeline Phase Index: 79Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b1af01f1-1ad1-aaab-fb17-a1da0bc1daf2Timeline Phase Duration: 6.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                              • +
                                                532.Player: When Vlaakith is deposed at last, I'm coming home to you. You have my word.Full-IllithidEPI_Epilogue_State_IsHologram

                                                  312.Gale: Then I offer you my word in exchange - I will wait for you, always.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 31bff307-210a-bdfc-3745-1a9c8e366565Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hb3cea212g108cg4265gab96ga175fa4bc03dText 1 UUID: 0dad8c6b-08b4-4a1c-8652-64536b13adfeText 2 Handle: h4b3004fcgfe4fg43dbg81f0g886e31e1088cText 2 UUID: 016b6899-a320-4c56-a3fd-db021615e44eShow Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  263.Gale: Your caution is warranted, but believe me - I know enough of divination to promise you our future is one worth looking forward to.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 73d412b2-920f-f320-06a1-d5002c09a2adSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h89f23493gd60cg47f9g975aga479f7d01fe5Text UUID: 8e978e5f-fc35-4a47-8e4b-e42e35a57d3fTimeline Phase Index: 37Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 73d412b2-920f-f320-06a1-d5002c09a2adTimeline Phase Duration: 8.67sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    412.Gale: A crackling hearth, two cosy armchairs beside it, a bottle of wine to be poured, and your battle-worn boots discarded at long last by the door.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bf37b1a6-f0dd-94f4-1526-955b7db67c4eSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h94ef9b3bgbc75g4b91ga19bg6c7f64435cacText UUID: 753d91a3-ed2d-441e-bb6a-5339888638f8Timeline Phase Index: 89Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bf37b1a6-f0dd-94f4-1526-955b7db67c4eTimeline Phase Duration: 11.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                    • See Node 208 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 489
                                                    • +
                                                      91.Gale: That is the life we have waiting for us. Believe in it, and it will come.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 298a0652-851f-5234-01d4-615782c51db3Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: he75f8741gb131g4ad8ga8e1gc7946fddc270Text UUID: d3f78c5f-08f6-4bbb-bba4-e1edf9397c54Timeline Phase Index: 114Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 298a0652-851f-5234-01d4-615782c51db3Timeline Phase Duration: 7.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                      • See Node 489 Jump to Node 507
                                              • +
                                                174.Player: Don't wait for me, Gale. I won't be returning to Faerûn.Full-Illithid

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                ruletagtype rule

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5008ff15-0922-054e-c596-0e9f5c787d4aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h80d74b92g7e08g4e93gbd49g8b2030d73a58Text 1 UUID: 87cfbbbc-d4a2-44e5-bb3d-0a5a6064f7d2Text 2 Handle: h4077d68cg2a49g4676g86c6g838bc696c552Text 2 UUID: 5365141d-13ca-43c2-858f-34f1078d0b37Show Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  246.Gale: I see. Then you truly aren't coming back?note: Small shake of the head from the player - they're sad about this too.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6f8b747d-36d2-b3d2-51bc-9d22b04be325Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hbc53300fgd5afg455bg84fdgd4306c09b296Text UUID: 4e9cbf3a-33a1-461b-b9f2-5113473b6470Timeline Phase Index: 193Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6f8b747d-36d2-b3d2-51bc-9d22b04be325Timeline Phase Duration: 18.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 6f8b747d-36d2-b3d2-51bc-9d22b04be325Group Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    167.Gale: Well, that makes this evening all the more special. A fond farewell for someone I am most, most fond of.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4e62166b-bba2-9139-6b77-3964b5f6f2bdSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hf0c46725g070eg4d3egaeacg549bae7a5cb6Text UUID: 5c78263c-c2cd-4e23-b686-779148f4623aGroup ID: 6f8b747d-36d2-b3d2-51bc-9d22b04be325Group Index: 1
                                                    • +

                                                534.Jump to Node 350

                                                Metadata

                                            • +
                                              259.Gale: I'd be delighted to introduce you to my current cohort - as a guest lecturer, perhaps? I'm sure they'd have plenty of questions for you.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 72b5fe65-7e9e-279a-01e3-8daf13e3fcc1Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hfa616a21gd1f1g4474ga417gb78705e0c9b6Text UUID: 479b5206-14a9-4bbe-8d3a-21836e39997aTimeline Phase Index: 35Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 72b5fe65-7e9e-279a-01e3-8daf13e3fcc1Timeline Phase Duration: 10.58sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                              • +
                                                146.Player: It would be my pleasure.!Full-Illithid

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                                Metadata

                                                • +
                                                  531.Gale: Excellent. I knew you wouldn't be able to resist the allure of sharing your expertise.

                                                  Metadata

                                                      • +
                                                        39.Gale: My apologies, Tara. That would be our tower.

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 12167697-747b-5d6c-044b-f71c81cb11c4Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h2dea7d3bg72acg4d3cgb437g06357a29d4afText UUID: 1c08345d-f0eb-4110-bf3f-ce7f2e510be7Group ID: 98d90e41-f868-2991-ca1c-2f30749b48f8Group Index: 2
                                                        • +
                                                          503.Gale: It will give us plenty of time to catch up on your adventures.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e93f4d1c-67a1-4436-9dc9-828a30d07337Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h9a8e779cg921eg4d30gacadg30403ff42119Text UUID: f6da0147-fa5b-40be-b2c4-a89dac370c54Timeline Phase Index: 64Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e93f4d1c-67a1-4436-9dc9-828a30d07337Timeline Phase Duration: 3.91sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                          • +
                                                            204.Gale: I'm very curious to know what you've been up to these past months, but I suspect the telling of that tale would keep you tied to me all evening.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5dadb63f-da1e-8164-7296-604097b2ef64Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hc5cd70a1g214ag4a20gaa6ag68134870a1c6Text UUID: e05365a2-3246-4ef1-adce-663ab492545aTimeline Phase Index: 199Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5dadb63f-da1e-8164-7296-604097b2ef64Timeline Phase Duration: 17.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 5dadb63f-da1e-8164-7296-604097b2ef64Group Index: 0
                                                            • •
                                                              343.Gale: So, in the spirit of selflessness I encourage you to mix and mingle for now. We've time enough to come. [End]

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9b5aeb8d-aac6-1664-61c8-554be53c072dSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: he51eed48g2b0ag40ffga803g597afd443dfaText UUID: c7db29d4-a0cb-4e47-bca0-2376d269a5acEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 5dadb63f-da1e-8164-7296-604097b2ef64Group Index: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    270.Gale: Of course you'll be most welcome to stay with me in my tower.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 75dfe234-ca45-fb35-af5f-39d24ab18108Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: he25f89e2g9032g43b8ga3c2g109c108c50d7Text UUID: 53033fb3-4cac-429a-97a4-94f7d8c3b346Timeline Phase Index: 40Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 75dfe234-ca45-fb35-af5f-39d24ab18108Timeline Phase Duration: 4.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                    • See Node 503 (Gale) It will give us plenty of time to catch up on your adventures.
                                              • +
                                                225.Player: Tempting... but I have to decline. I'd hate to harm your chances of tenure by luring them to Lady Shar quite so soon.ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_KilledParentsShadowheart!Full-Illithid

                                                519.Player: But of course! Who wouldn't want to hear me speak?AstarionWyllDark UrgeLae'zel!Full-Illithid

                                                Text

                                                Variant 1

                                                combine=0
                                                • Astarion
                                                But of course! Who wouldn't want to hear me speak?
                                                h29387f65g8d4cg4735gbd4eg93eefb78a869 | cf7e4c8e-659e-434d-b2d9-c4c3ebcc66b8 | stub

                                                Variant 2

                                                combine=0
                                                • Wyll
                                                Well, I suppose I could share a few harsh lessons I learned in the frontiers.
                                                h2a421d9agef08g4116gb0d2g24b2ac95b4ec | 1762649b-d2b5-4dfd-a602-5e3e6476b4da | stub

                                                Variant 3

                                                combine=0
                                                • Dark Urge
                                                The healing of my cranial trauma would be a prime case study for the school of Evocation.

                                                Variant 4

                                                combine=0
                                                • Lae'zel

                                                hf6d64dafge71eg4b6bgab96g679639f50943 | 1359272a-3d55-4b61-a35c-b7a6d67d256f | stub

                                              • +
                                                554.Player: I'll respectfully decline. Sounds too much like hard work to me.!Full-Illithid

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fccf7315-5374-c56a-d3ca-9aab54022173Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h92f34a17gbcd0g426fga89bgc62bbfe6951eText UUID: bb36973f-0152-40af-8dfa-24fd2ecd578eShow Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  273.Gale: I totally understand. Perhaps our exploits might be a little on the mature side for my students, come to think of it...

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 76f6b28a-0686-ffec-7f2f-ee2755ed3a2cSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hc5bca278ga90dg4ac3g93c7gf65ceb142dddText UUID: ade93aa1-d8b5-4ae1-a17a-d191422b8e13Timeline Phase Index: 41Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 76f6b28a-0686-ffec-7f2f-ee2755ed3a2cTimeline Phase Duration: 8.58sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    527.Gale: Still, at the very least you must come visit me. I've a pantry full of Waterdhavian delicacies and a delightful bottle of Elverquisst with your name on them...!EPI_Epilogue_State_AvatarWasInAvernusWithKarlach

                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player

                                                    • +
                                                      444.Player: My diet is more... cerebral these days, Gale. You'll need to rethink your menu.Full-Illithid

                                                      • +
                                                        29.Gale: Say no more. There's a wizard in Blackstaff's anatomical department who owes me a favour, no questions asked. All diets will be catered for. I can hardly wait.

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0be3103e-2d1d-69b3-9f58-5919876efbfaSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h9e025494gf7a0g4c10g9c30g15fa6a76bd6bText UUID: 50fd05d3-ea6b-4eab-84c3-1e7e376b1dfaTimeline Phase Index: 141Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0be3103e-2d1d-69b3-9f58-5919876efbfaTimeline Phase Duration: 13.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                        • See Node 503 (Gale) It will give us plenty of time to catch up on your adventures.

                                              • +
                                                226.Player: Sorry, wiz, I'm going back to Avernus after the party.!Full-IllithidKarlach

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                                • +
                                                  78.Gale: I suppose, if I were to open a contained portal in a particularly safe region of Avernus...

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2438c767-dff8-1a64-959e-3ab27f6a6432Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hd0683b6bgf038g4d2cg80f1gc092cbea477aText UUID: dae3c127-7ada-4b63-b340-8cd8c0a68ff7Timeline Phase Index: 108Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2438c767-dff8-1a64-959e-3ab27f6a6432Timeline Phase Duration: 16.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 2438c767-dff8-1a64-959e-3ab27f6a6432Group Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    400.Gale: No. The Blackstaff would never allow it. Health and safety, you see - it's all the rage in wizardry these days.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bae5f8d2-1daf-be14-919d-eb1df59c1f90Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h0508c762g74e9g4071g9ea2gdeac3fd020c4Text UUID: 5ef61b9e-da7e-4a72-b942-70d7c013e11cGroup ID: 2438c767-dff8-1a64-959e-3ab27f6a6432Group Index: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      299.Gale: Perhaps I might come to you, then? I recently met the most excellent diabolist who should be able to lend a hand with the travel arrangements...

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 84b6f720-dcad-b44c-09b7-fe65e44fe194Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h178a8178g2404g42d2gb6feg3d974f84aafcText UUID: 289b7741-1cda-4216-9427-a2b1f111f0eeTimeline Phase Index: 27Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 84b6f720-dcad-b44c-09b7-fe65e44fe194Timeline Phase Duration: 9.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                      • +

                                              • +
                                                296.Player: Of course. I'm sure they'll have many questions about the nature of my psionic powers...Full-Illithid

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 83871105-f7de-8935-dbfe-29436d5ea16bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb9b56e82g8175g4321g8420g2f99de7e55eaText UUID: 18e89c08-1c73-425b-9c06-9942cd2d167eShow Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  216.Gale: Never fear. My students are as open-minded and generous a bunch as you'll find north of the Chionthar. And I'll remind them of their manners.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 62a9935b-b5c1-b715-4f1d-7905932b9d1aSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h7e549786g2f1ag4082g8c72g2fb1fecb155aText UUID: 2b0aea69-20fe-4176-a6b5-f1f25223c01eTimeline Phase Index: 169Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 62a9935b-b5c1-b715-4f1d-7905932b9d1aTimeline Phase Duration: 9.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • •
                                                    1.Jump to Node 531

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: JumpUUID: 0176f227-ff61-8d64-1042-00168dda5bd4Jump Target: Node 531 (f3a94488-72f4-f533-30b7-6b748a2efb13)Jump Target Point: 2
                                              • +
                                                428.Player: You're certain your students will listen to me? Few are willing to grant a mind flayer an audience.Full-Illithid

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c57c7341-744e-890b-b962-1959de8dc308Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc1cce535g3923g4abeg8ce2gaedecdbfae21Text UUID: f190809e-f975-49da-a829-d8968c6343c9Show Once: True
                                                • See Node 216 (Gale) Never fear. My students are as open-minded and generous a bunch as you'll find north of the Chionthar. And I'll remind them of their manners.
                                              • +
                                                551.Player: I think not. Given my form, such exposure would make my life... complicated.Full-Illithid

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = True

                                                • •
                                                  504.Jump to Node 273

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: JumpUUID: e97a5def-2c99-1725-4a1c-d2eb7eb999e8Jump Target: Node 273 (76f6b28a-0686-ffec-7f2f-ee2755ed3a2c)Jump Target Point: 1
                                              • +
                                                333.Player: Teaching wizardlings to crack skulls? Sounds like fun.BarbarianBardClericDruidWizard+8 more!Full-Illithid

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                ruletagtype rule
                                                • Barbarian {02913f9a-f696-40cf-acdf-32032afab32c}
                                                • Bard {d93434bd-6b71-4789-b128-ee24156057cc}
                                                • Cleric {1671b4bf-4f47-4bb7-9cb9-80bb1f6009d5}
                                                • Druid {44ac4317-4d38-4d28-80e2-94024c6e42f0}
                                                • Wizard {6fe3ae27-dc6c-4fc9-9245-710c790c396c}
                                                • Warlock {5804f55a-93f7-4281-9512-8d548a9e2a22}
                                                • Sorcerer {18266c0b-efbc-4c80-8784-ada4a37218d7}
                                                • Paladin {6d85ab2d-5c23-498c-a61e-98f05a00177a}
                                                • Oathbreaker {c7bdcdf2-15e7-456e-adf1-21dda3172e18}
                                                • Rogue {f8a0608b-666c-4be6-a49c-03b369c10bd2}
                                                • Ranger {37a733c1-a862-4157-b92a-9cff46232c6a}
                                                • Monk {e1e460bb-d0ae-4452-8529-c9e176558731}
                                                • Fighter {1ae7017c-4884-4a43-bc4a-742fa0d201c0}
                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                                Text

                                                Variant 1

                                                combine=0
                                                • Barbarian
                                                Teaching wizardlings to crack skulls? Sounds like fun.
                                                h6ee5140dg6376g4fe6gb404g43e973bb2f40 | 78216b22-7e3f-4551-b315-3e7a479ae478 | stub

                                                Variant 2

                                                combine=0
                                                • Bard
                                                I suppose I could regale them with a stirring ballad or two about our epic journey together.
                                                h2fb034bage2ceg4206gbf50g24c9e1ae77f9 | 4fe0f7df-2f55-4860-9d74-d6063b92861b | stub

                                                Variant 3

                                                combine=0
                                                • Cleric
                                                Of course. What wizard wouldn't benefit from the wisdom my god has to offer?
                                                h5cff8204g12cdg40d3gbca9g33512f19de91 | ae5e8c49-74a0-43ba-85ef-9661b2a1cf16 | stub

                                                Variant 4

                                                combine=0
                                                • Druid
                                                I'd be honoured. To share knowledge with those eager to learn is the most natural impulse there is.
                                                h7946cedbg1a0ag4b1fga0f8ge0bc227d1497 | f5d02b43-0aab-440c-9eb8-c042b1278799 | stub

                                                Variant 5

                                                combine=0
                                                • Wizard
                                                I'll need to prepare a reading list, of course, and a space large enough for practical demonstrations of my various spell casting feats...
                                                h2eebeac4gc350g4c85gb800g5f133209b7ec | 6b2c3770-2598-4c16-bbfe-29943c645120 | stub

                                                Variant 6

                                                combine=0
                                                • Warlock
                                                Of course, but I'm afraid I'd be a two-for-one deal. My patron won't be able to resist the thought of a captive audience...
                                                h9e699efcg3f45g4e3cga3eeg35adcddbb290 | 94c59b51-73c8-47f9-8e70-f440cb16a8d2 | stub

                                                Variant 7

                                                combine=0
                                                • Sorcerer
                                                Teaching magic in a classroom? A novel thought indeed. Yes, why not?
                                                hce00fc46g88adg42f0gb690gf547366d75a1 | 286826e4-3ef0-4ae5-9cbf-467278aa5dce | stub

                                                Variant 8

                                                combine=0
                                                • Paladin
                                                • Oathbreaker
                                                Of course. Perhaps the discipline of my oath will help them avoid the wayward paths of the less principled of your kind.
                                                hcb8c99a3gc65ag4e5bgbc15gebc548e68cd5 | 0196fb11-3451-486b-be28-2d0c58e77682 | stub

                                                Variant 9

                                                combine=0
                                                • Rogue
                                                But of course. I can't think of anyone better to let loose on a room of impressionable apprentices...
                                                h54fb0bcdge33eg428cg9a12gb81fade3fea3 | 19349d18-fc52-426f-805a-45c92a8c901e | stub

                                                Variant 10

                                                combine=0
                                                • Ranger
                                                I might show them how to fend for themselves in the wilds. Few of your kind seem to manage that particular feat.
                                                h2d24dcd4g6aeag45b6ga4c4g277dc95b110d | 221da9e5-1bbe-4f71-843c-0f72c6f1283b | stub

                                                Variant 11

                                                combine=0
                                                • Monk
                                                Discipline. Focus. The art of unarmed combat. All things that would benefit a wizard in their studies. It would be an honour.
                                                h8ad65158g6184g4414g90d9gbe5af62d94bd | 933c5be7-1610-4ed9-9928-ec9dafcddef6 | stub

                                                Variant 12

                                                combine=0
                                                • Fighter
                                                I'm not sure your students are ready for what I'd have to teach. Get them to sign a waiver, and I'll be there.
                                                h9a982ab0g162ag4662g9750gcfe0e16ddba1 | 013c03aa-2b37-4ff3-9e2f-666fb6245af4 | stub

                                                Variant 13

                                                combine=0
                                                • Oathbreaker
                                                If nothing else, my tale might encourage them to take greater note of their principles, before it's too late.
                                                he9f545f5gd9ecg443cga26cg75beb35cd41b | fee83c2f-00ea-4934-a177-c0c61961608d | stub

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9472fe71-e317-816e-cc45-41c8e60aac5aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h6ee5140dg6376g4fe6gb404g43e973bb2f40Text 1 UUID: 78216b22-7e3f-4551-b315-3e7a479ae478Text 2 Handle: h2fb034bage2ceg4206gbf50g24c9e1ae77f9Text 2 UUID: 4fe0f7df-2f55-4860-9d74-d6063b92861bText 3 Handle: h5cff8204g12cdg40d3gbca9g33512f19de91Text 3 UUID: ae5e8c49-74a0-43ba-85ef-9661b2a1cf16Text 4 Handle: h7946cedbg1a0ag4b1fga0f8ge0bc227d1497Text 4 UUID: f5d02b43-0aab-440c-9eb8-c042b1278799Text 5 Handle: h2eebeac4gc350g4c85gb800g5f133209b7ecText 5 UUID: 6b2c3770-2598-4c16-bbfe-29943c645120Text 6 Handle: h9e699efcg3f45g4e3cga3eeg35adcddbb290Text 6 UUID: 94c59b51-73c8-47f9-8e70-f440cb16a8d2Text 7 Handle: hce00fc46g88adg42f0gb690gf547366d75a1Text 7 UUID: 286826e4-3ef0-4ae5-9cbf-467278aa5dceText 8 Handle: hcb8c99a3gc65ag4e5bgbc15gebc548e68cd5Text 8 UUID: 0196fb11-3451-486b-be28-2d0c58e77682Text 9 Handle: h54fb0bcdge33eg428cg9a12gb81fade3fea3Text 9 UUID: 19349d18-fc52-426f-805a-45c92a8c901eText 10 Handle: h2d24dcd4g6aeag45b6ga4c4g277dc95b110dText 10 UUID: 221da9e5-1bbe-4f71-843c-0f72c6f1283bText 11 Handle: h8ad65158g6184g4414g90d9gbe5af62d94bdText 11 UUID: 933c5be7-1610-4ed9-9928-ec9dafcddef6Text 12 Handle: h9a982ab0g162ag4662g9750gcfe0e16ddba1Text 12 UUID: 013c03aa-2b37-4ff3-9e2f-666fb6245af4Text 13 Handle: he9f545f5gd9ecg443cga26cg75beb35cd41bText 13 UUID: fee83c2f-00ea-4934-a177-c0c61961608dShow Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  27.Gale: Well, I for one can't wait. And I say with some confidence - neither can they.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 09dc55e0-203e-27e5-5a00-ae63d1fcde4aSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h9fca000dg9af9g4c10gaf09gbe3700a92f35Text UUID: d0dbe259-145d-4c69-a6ce-a3b268cf2087Timeline Phase Index: 140Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 09dc55e0-203e-27e5-5a00-ae63d1fcde4aTimeline Phase Duration: 6.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • •

                                                    Node Type: JumpUUID: c971b4de-b1e9-a91a-16d6-5fe5de10596aJump Target: Node 531 (f3a94488-72f4-f533-30b7-6b748a2efb13)Jump Target Point: 2
                                      • +
                                        181.Player: I found someone who loves me, even in this form. 'Happiness' is the best word for what I feel.Full-IllithidORI_State_Partnered!ORI_State_PartneredWithGale

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        ruletagtype rule
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                                        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                        • ORI_State_Partnered {6c1a31e8-1d3d-42a5-af4f-72ef7a798f74} = True
                                        • ORI_State_PartneredWithGale {e008e20d-d642-42ed-9008-297b6273aa21} = False

                                        Text

                                        Variant 1

                                        combine=0
                                        • Full-Illithid
                                        I found someone who loves me, even in this form. 'Happiness' is the best word for what I feel.
                                        hcd893e74g90ccg4055g80a5g9498d1a110a3 | fd7eb380-cd75-4eaf-ba6d-340c28996f1e | stub

                                        Variant 2

                                        I found the love of my life. I'd say I'm pretty happy.
                                        hbf5674aeg36b9g4aafg95b6g4cb98c2c96b0 | 65184303-3d18-4c66-bbf6-14d431835399 | stub

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 52b26500-a29c-6452-58a0-3866ba7ff5ceSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hcd893e74g90ccg4055g80a5g9498d1a110a3Text 1 UUID: fd7eb380-cd75-4eaf-ba6d-340c28996f1eText 2 Handle: hbf5674aeg36b9g4aafg95b6g4cb98c2c96b0Text 2 UUID: 65184303-3d18-4c66-bbf6-14d431835399Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          408.Gale: And I couldn't be happier for you. A fitting reward for the sacrifices you made in getting here.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: be482cf1-799d-6dc9-ef5c-8d2fed879202Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h1568a48egd3d7g4367g8752g90195142890fText UUID: 1c43b2b9-8034-4ab6-ac49-8d99bc17e4e9Timeline Phase Index: 87Timeline Dialog Node UUID: be482cf1-799d-6dc9-ef5c-8d2fed879202Timeline Phase Duration: 6.06sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • See Node 443 (Gale) I've told my students plenty of tales about our escapades. You're something of a hero to them, you know.
                                      • +
                                        274.Player: You haven't heard the latest tales of my heroics?!Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 778ad915-0540-954a-95e9-9b35d90ac9cbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h59a4ffd9g5cc7g4530g947cg9641100c2af4Text UUID: 3e5b4642-79bd-43fa-a1be-e1d632ac4271Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          124.Gale: Oh I assure you - my students keep me very well informed of your escapades, past and present. You're something of a hero to them.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 34e2fc10-d52d-ba01-e042-38fb94d204b7Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h79d0343bga69bg4a4fga2b8g7a57f421db4aText UUID: ccd1b164-3afe-4322-8fca-d837a1405cfdTimeline Phase Index: 179Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 34e2fc10-d52d-ba01-e042-38fb94d204b7Timeline Phase Duration: 8.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • •
                                            46.Jump to Node 259

                                            Node Type: JumpUUID: 14c2252d-c3a5-3b8a-0349-9df9dccb1e3cJump Target: Node 259 (72b5fe65-7e9e-279a-01e3-8daf13e3fcc1)Jump Target Point: 1
                                      • +
                                        529.Player: Life as the Vampire Ascendant is busier than I expected. There's my lair to decorate, spawn to recruit, a domain to protect. I'm exhausted.ORI_Astarion_State_BecameVampireLord!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell!Full-IllithidAstarion

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Global
                                        • ORI_Astarion_State_BecameVampireLord {c446ce94-efd8-45d5-b407-284177b6b57e} = True

                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False
                                        • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3} = True

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f369eea5-d0b4-6308-8b8a-19f8f00e02adSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf77d8c54g8377g49b6gb1f0g3184ee0bcef6Text UUID: 7d810b4c-3132-463b-8399-7ff6b97bb3e4Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          286.Gale: Still keeping those teeth sharp, I'll wager.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7d1b911e-083e-ad37-9ff8-3e74276872f0Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: haf007a0cgf197g4214gb4fcg8d30526fbf5fText UUID: c83ef630-b6aa-4c31-bbfe-671f6e66406dTimeline Phase Index: 45Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7d1b911e-083e-ad37-9ff8-3e74276872f0Timeline Phase Duration: 2.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • •
                                            523.Jump to Node 443

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: JumpUUID: ef16134a-0f9d-f3be-8383-a06e7f0b47fcJump Target: Node 443 (cf9634a8-06a7-17a3-84fc-21f7f7249c0c)Jump Target Point: 1
                                      • +
                                        254.Player: I've settled back into the shadows. It turns out there's a lot more fun to be had there when you don't have a bitter, cruel vampire lord watching over you.ORI_Astarion_State_CazadorPermaDefeated!ORI_Astarion_State_BecameVampireLord!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell!Full-IllithidAstarion

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3} = True

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 71587cbd-3be2-5ec1-e9fe-01b627056abfSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h08acac36g9113g4757ga3fbg063a86ecfd1eText UUID: e44dec29-88e5-4da5-982d-5339470b904bShow Once: True
                                        • See Node 286 (Gale) Still keeping those teeth sharp, I'll wager.
                                      • +
                                        107.Player: Oh, my life's much the same as before. Plotting Cazador's eventual, painful destruction...!ORI_Astarion_State_CazadorPermaDefeated!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellAstarion

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Global

                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3} = True

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 312263c9-9a74-df3d-3084-a9ca67185a24Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h66edc71fgb6fbg4a36ga205gaff308789837Text UUID: 8749c314-3633-4152-a74d-b3e33c6094feShow Once: True
                                        • See Node 286 (Gale) Still keeping those teeth sharp, I'll wager.
                                      • +
                                        205.Player: Lady Shar's church flourishes - but with it comes a great deal of work. I am kept busy, leading her ever-growing flock.ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_KilledParents!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellShadowheart!Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Global
                                        • ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_KilledParents {3a3b0ecf-a1ed-4733-8548-0348befc6bac} = True
                                        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                        • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = False
                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0} = True
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5de7dea6-109b-dafb-5bc5-db20f67b3b71Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1c3690bcg9758g4b02gbae0g4ae96c0fd0c8Text UUID: 57eb8f9f-ee04-4636-8bf1-17f3f0310f93Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          172.Gale: Impressive. I'm afraid news of your church's success hasn't yet reached my ears in Waterdeep, but where Shar's concerned, I suppose secrecy is rather the point.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4f52654f-1866-2d5b-24c2-172a7a496a45Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h15ee4216g6822g4d33gbf21ga7cbd9bd6d69Text UUID: 8c2ce63c-23ff-4530-b3ec-9fc90cdb4c7bTimeline Phase Index: 190Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4f52654f-1866-2d5b-24c2-172a7a496a45Timeline Phase Duration: 12.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • •
                                            258.Jump to Node 443

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: JumpUUID: 729a8a4b-10ef-145f-0549-4187e290e1dbJump Target: Node 443 (cf9634a8-06a7-17a3-84fc-21f7f7249c0c)Jump Target Point: 1
                                      • +
                                        233.Player: I've been getting acquainted with the length and breadth of Faerûn - there's a lot to see, now that I'm free from Shar.ORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_KilledParents!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellShadowheart

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Global

                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0} = True

                                        Metadata

                                        • +
                                          415.Gale: Sounds delightful. What a joy it must be to live so freely in the light at last.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c09c437c-60a8-1294-8beb-e570f271a04fSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h959ca7efgd3fcg4fabgb380g034aeea70daaText UUID: 89cd89ef-79b9-4bcb-ba90-f91aa4d74353Timeline Phase Index: 90Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c09c437c-60a8-1294-8beb-e570f271a04fTimeline Phase Duration: 5.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • •
                                            493.Jump to Node 443

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: JumpUUID: e5e38694-b2c2-88f5-f57a-40256cbf4e92Jump Target: Node 443 (cf9634a8-06a7-17a3-84fc-21f7f7249c0c)Jump Target Point: 1
                                      • +
                                        192.Player: I've got myself a quiet little cottage, a growing menagerie of animals, and my parents close at hand. I wouldn't trade it for anything.ORI_Shadowheart_State_RejectShar_SavedParents!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellShadowheart!Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bd0951c4-36b5-8bcd-1825-b223541b52dcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4cbbe438gd553g4014gb60dg75506113f893Text UUID: 386d4d86-0877-4b0e-9c25-d81ad1eca73eShow Once: True
                                        • See Node 415 (Gale) Sounds delightful. What a joy it must be to live so freely in the light at last.
                                      • +
                                        539.Player: I've been pursuing unfinished business. Defeating the Absolute came at the expense of my own concerns - now I have to rectify that.!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellShadowheart

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                        • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = False
                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Shadowheart {8b4cf0fa-f712-4839-9439-f86a519078fa} = True

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f6bda766-d214-7096-9e14-33b2f217ec65Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hed378b6cg63b0g45e3g80c8gfdea6be750c7Text UUID: 8e1984fc-a836-4dc7-912d-ebe6e1474443Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          122.Gale: Gotcha, gotcha. Your secrets are safe with me...

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 34c39abb-7249-3623-ba20-8694a3d7e045Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h2200d6b3gc08bg4bbbg8a04g930d5b8eb0c6Text UUID: 60d8680e-bd40-4401-bd72-a3e3eea73366Timeline Phase Index: 188Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 34c39abb-7249-3623-ba20-8694a3d7e045Timeline Phase Duration: 5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • See Node 493 Jump to Node 443
                                      • +
                                        359.Player: You know me. Neck deep in devil guts and demon blood until I find a permanent way out.!Full-IllithidKarlach

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False
                                        • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a} = True

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a4d21080-c1f0-d8e6-6dd7-520ce7357adbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd123b370gc640g4526gbf80g807cb82a5731Text UUID: fec96221-ae0d-41b9-90c5-382e8f7c1750Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          437.Gale: I almost feel sorry for the devils in your path. I mean, I don't, of course. I'm sure they deserve it.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cb04c88e-d9aa-3947-3388-4dde7e07b8ceSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h76053dfbg7fd6g4d4eg892eg9fb56cc3e436Text UUID: 4d2fb79d-968d-4fbe-ae3b-ddc0af9d24a6Timeline Phase Index: 97Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cb04c88e-d9aa-3947-3388-4dde7e07b8ceTimeline Phase Duration: 6.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • •

                                      • +
                                        51.Player: I remain dedicated to the Coast. I will slay every last monster that threatens the people.GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiers!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellWyll!Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        • +
                                          66.Gale: No harm keeping yourself busy. You've a reputation to maintain, after all.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1f5c6799-8631-930c-7d4e-f9a76f03777aSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hba3bdecbg7975g48dfgbf0eg2eb2a0ddf5c7Text UUID: 17411411-6564-4642-81ed-75ec0417208dTimeline Phase Index: 104Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1f5c6799-8631-930c-7d4e-f9a76f03777aTimeline Phase Duration: 5.09sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                      • +
                                        235.Player: My life as a Duke is one of bargains, diplomacy, and limited time to enjoy the successes.GLO_Wyll_State_GrandDuke!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellWyll!Full-Illithid
