                                        • See Node 66 (Gale) No harm keeping yourself busy. You've a reputation to maintain, after all.
                                      • +
                                        282.Player: I've ripped the horns off so many cambions and pit fiends, I've lost count.GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfAvernusWyll!Full-Illithid

                                      • +
                                        265.Player: When the innocent of the Coast are in danger, the Blade will always come calling.!GLO_Wyll_State_GrandDuke!GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiers!GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfAvernusWyll!Full-Illithid

                                        • See Node 66 (Gale) No harm keeping yourself busy. You've a reputation to maintain, after all.
                                      • +
                                        248.Player: I'm on the verge of a diplomatic breakthrough with the githzerai leader. Vlaakith's days are numbered.ORI_Laezel_State_PlayerLaezelOrpheus!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellLae'zel!Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player

                                        • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = False
                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5} = True
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 700398c3-83b6-f34f-9769-8d928d1ffb0bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6be7de64g4b7bg42d8gb5fagc9be73303e5bText UUID: a5e55821-0e84-4c71-b356-6fd733a025d2Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          40.Gale: Well I never. Lae'zel of K'liir, astral warrior, champion of her people, a diplomat. Nothing wrong with a bit of character growth.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 12ea398b-5168-d567-1b12-e4ec83d14ef9Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h7965295cg2e87g47d4ga9eag807d1df45323Text UUID: f6a7b80a-e781-47d2-99ab-265e2d113877Timeline Phase Index: 148Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 12ea398b-5168-d567-1b12-e4ec83d14ef9Timeline Phase Duration: 12.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • •
                                            441.Jump to Node 443

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: JumpUUID: cd1bd933-f9b9-d06e-c01b-c497d55fd786Jump Target: Node 443 (cf9634a8-06a7-17a3-84fc-21f7f7249c0c)Jump Target Point: 1
                                      • +
                                        217.Player: Vlaakith's forces hound me. And every last sarth among them has fallen to my blade.!ORI_Laezel_State_PlayerLaezelOrpheus!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellLae'zel!Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6324a655-33b4-3ab6-b3e7-740d492218cdSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hba0ac619ga5ceg4e74g8246gaacf2686bb1fText UUID: 00943e95-9cfd-4220-8c1c-b2a69797731aShow Once: True
                                        • +
                                          128.Gale: Well, I for one can't think of anyone better equipped to survive the endless wrath of an all-powerful deity with an empire of violent and morally dubious astral warriors at her disposal.

                                          Text

                                          Well, I for one can't think of anyone better equipped to survive the endless wrath of an all-powerful deity with an empire of violent and morally dubious astral warriors at her disposal.
                                          h2f65c4f4ge558g427fg9db5ge3488fc2c058 | 0ea2e722-537f-478b-9284-a1b89f6a6daf | stub

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 38dfe038-b64d-9ca9-3927-62c7aa5d9b77Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h2f65c4f4ge558g427fg9db5ge3488fc2c058Text UUID: 0ea2e722-537f-478b-9284-a1b89f6a6dafTimeline Phase Index: 194Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 38dfe038-b64d-9ca9-3927-62c7aa5d9b77Timeline Phase Duration: 12.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • See Node 441 Jump to Node 443
                                      • +
                                        165.Player: I've been practising meditation. Taking naps. I might train to be a massage therapist.!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellDark Urge!Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                        • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = False
                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2} = True
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4d8ec199-c73f-4357-fd0f-be31f09bb3c5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb2dff9c4g2490g4739gb632gd041ee5b467aText UUID: ca78b1aa-e5b4-442d-9b7e-405fa5f26e83Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          537.Gale: Really? Well, I'm glad you've found a new profession, though best not to mention any previous neck-snapping inclinations, I imagine.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f6aec88a-3e20-34c5-3c94-a3814f26f882Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h0e72e6c7gc673g4cabga47eg5f8eb269b655Text UUID: be9975e7-ac68-4283-ac5c-268f5127b694Timeline Phase Index: 72Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f6aec88a-3e20-34c5-3c94-a3814f26f882Timeline Phase Duration: 10.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                          241.Jump to Node 437

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: JumpUUID: 6be09c31-9309-9f1e-ad02-1283ca1836c8Jump Target: Node 437 (cb04c88e-d9aa-3947-3388-4dde7e07b8ce)Jump Target Point: 1
                                      • +
                                        152.Player: Still smashing jaws and raging at my enemies. It's bloody brilliant.BarbarianBardClericDruidWizard+8 more!Wyll!Shadowheart!Full-Illithid

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        ruletagtype rule
                                        • Barbarian {02913f9a-f696-40cf-acdf-32032afab32c}
                                        • Bard {d93434bd-6b71-4789-b128-ee24156057cc}
                                        • Cleric {1671b4bf-4f47-4bb7-9cb9-80bb1f6009d5}
                                        • Druid {44ac4317-4d38-4d28-80e2-94024c6e42f0}
                                        • Wizard {6fe3ae27-dc6c-4fc9-9245-710c790c396c}
                                        • Warlock {5804f55a-93f7-4281-9512-8d548a9e2a22}
                                        • Sorcerer {18266c0b-efbc-4c80-8784-ada4a37218d7}
                                        • Paladin {6d85ab2d-5c23-498c-a61e-98f05a00177a}
                                        • Oathbreaker {c7bdcdf2-15e7-456e-adf1-21dda3172e18}
                                        • Rogue {f8a0608b-666c-4be6-a49c-03b369c10bd2}
                                        • Ranger {37a733c1-a862-4157-b92a-9cff46232c6a}
                                        • Monk {e1e460bb-d0ae-4452-8529-c9e176558731}
                                        • Fighter {1ae7017c-4884-4a43-bc4a-742fa0d201c0}
                                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                        • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956} = False
                                        • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0} = False
                                        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                                        Text

                                        Variant 1

                                        combine=0
                                        • Barbarian
                                        Still smashing jaws and raging at my enemies. It's bloody brilliant.
                                        hc4ff5eeegb87fg42b4g8d49ga97b42f75b48 | fa417b3e-f3b6-477f-a52b-4d83061b6f4e | stub

                                        Variant 2

                                        combine=0
                                        • Bard
                                        My repertoire has some truly spell-binding new songs in it, inspired by our feats of unbridled heroism.
                                        h657a9169ge44bg4cefg9f0agd29128c15bc5 | bd1092cc-b8b6-415f-a8fe-1f8a43cdf4d5 | stub

                                        Variant 3

                                        combine=0
                                        • Cleric
                                        I find new purpose in my faith. There is much to be done, and I know now that prayer alone is not enough to save the world.
                                        h140082d9g921dg486cg8426gf75db9c89b71 | 00dd903c-f7c7-4467-b704-b06382ae4220 | stub

                                        Variant 4

                                        combine=0
                                        • Druid
                                        I've found solace in the wilds once more. Where there is nature, I will always find my purpose.
                                        hc536b6b7gd920g4134g88d5g17bae06fb942 | ddd04806-949f-4403-a9d9-71292cc103bf | stub

                                        Variant 5

                                        combine=0
                                        • Wizard
                                        I found the most excellent series of arcane tomes beneath an abandoned wizard's tower. I'll be studying those for a decade at least.
                                        h9ca34588g3264g4a88g8f3fg5c2c1e0c2bcf | 9e1c21b1-81fe-4587-b8a9-21c0e6ee1c65 | stub

                                        Variant 6

                                        combine=0
                                        • Warlock
                                        I'm afraid were I to divulge my recent activities, I'd have to kill you. Or rather, my patron would.
                                        h0992116egedafg4fbag9eabg6bc08bc662ea | a7086cfb-11f2-4758-9226-ab232cc01f98 | stub

                                        Variant 7

                                        combine=0
                                        • Sorcerer
                                        I've been enjoying my innate and effortless talent for magic, of course. No further education required.
                                        h25272ac3gdc4cg4734gb9f9g31a28b5d1229 | 8e4220ae-3d25-4898-9d32-475e4a9649f2 | stub

                                        Variant 8

                                        combine=0
                                        • Paladin
                                        • Oathbreaker
                                        I've been following the path my oath laid before me. My doctrine holds fast, as does my pledge to aid those it protects.
                                        h0b8c97aag4acfg4b54gaad2g317931eb0c0c | 83bb7c20-d8ce-44e5-b25e-98524d574a48 | stub

                                        Variant 9

                                        combine=0
                                        • Rogue
                                        I'd like to say I've been up to no good... And that would be true. I've been up to no good.
                                        h84d37d08g948fg45e8ga28cg13e2a4172222 | 2c4a6582-dafd-4c5c-972c-b45ae7f6fac4 | stub

                                        Variant 10

                                        combine=0
                                        • Ranger
                                        I've been enjoying the solitude of life on the road, going where I'm wanted, and staying no longer than I'm needed.
                                        h465c9d57gb8d4g4fd7ga810g09f1133a1c1f | dcaa3182-ecc2-466e-9c32-f52106580d18 | stub

                                        Variant 11

                                        combine=0
                                        • Monk
                                        Our journey together granted me unprecedented clarity. I feel more connected to my Ki than ever.
                                        h6f3aa33bgf50ag4a64g85d9gbdd219b3c266 | b8282375-1aa0-4b3d-97d3-f1a7b39c2396 | stub

                                        Variant 12

                                        combine=0
                                        • Fighter
                                        I've kept my weapons sharp and my mind sharper. If there's another world-ending threat awaiting us, I'll be ready.
                                        h39a66c6dg4332g4170g9facg00441da94f84 | 92bb3232-3f7b-4f8e-8ce2-ff45d31493d5 | stub

                                        Variant 13

                                        combine=0
                                        • Oathbreaker
                                        I've been learning to see the world anew, without the tunnel vision my oath imposed. It's been... enlightening.
                                        h2575a33fg1c3ag495cgb8d7gaf553ff0281f | 4b7a0c4d-0f88-4ca1-b9eb-542dbbed8461 | stub

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4409ed14-25e1-db83-ab3f-4311d94de5eeSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hc4ff5eeegb87fg42b4g8d49ga97b42f75b48Text 1 UUID: fa417b3e-f3b6-477f-a52b-4d83061b6f4eText 2 Handle: h657a9169ge44bg4cefg9f0agd29128c15bc5Text 2 UUID: bd1092cc-b8b6-415f-a8fe-1f8a43cdf4d5Text 3 Handle: h140082d9g921dg486cg8426gf75db9c89b71Text 3 UUID: 00dd903c-f7c7-4467-b704-b06382ae4220Text 4 Handle: hc536b6b7gd920g4134g88d5g17bae06fb942Text 4 UUID: ddd04806-949f-4403-a9d9-71292cc103bfText 5 Handle: h9ca34588g3264g4a88g8f3fg5c2c1e0c2bcfText 5 UUID: 9e1c21b1-81fe-4587-b8a9-21c0e6ee1c65Text 6 Handle: h0992116egedafg4fbag9eabg6bc08bc662eaText 6 UUID: a7086cfb-11f2-4758-9226-ab232cc01f98Text 7 Handle: h25272ac3gdc4cg4734gb9f9g31a28b5d1229Text 7 UUID: 8e4220ae-3d25-4898-9d32-475e4a9649f2Text 8 Handle: h0b8c97aag4acfg4b54gaad2g317931eb0c0cText 8 UUID: 83bb7c20-d8ce-44e5-b25e-98524d574a48Text 9 Handle: h84d37d08g948fg45e8ga28cg13e2a4172222Text 9 UUID: 2c4a6582-dafd-4c5c-972c-b45ae7f6fac4Text 10 Handle: h465c9d57gb8d4g4fd7ga810g09f1133a1c1fText 10 UUID: dcaa3182-ecc2-466e-9c32-f52106580d18Text 11 Handle: h6f3aa33bgf50ag4a64g85d9gbdd219b3c266Text 11 UUID: b8282375-1aa0-4b3d-97d3-f1a7b39c2396Text 12 Handle: h39a66c6dg4332g4170g9facg00441da94f84Text 12 UUID: 92bb3232-3f7b-4f8e-8ce2-ff45d31493d5Text 13 Handle: h2575a33fg1c3ag495cgb8d7gaf553ff0281fText 13 UUID: 4b7a0c4d-0f88-4ca1-b9eb-542dbbed8461Show Once: True
                                        • +
                                          324.Gale: From you, I'd expect nothing less.

                                          Metadata

                          • +
                            431.Player: You used to take yourself rather seriously, you know...Full-Illithid

                            Flags and Tags

                            ruletagtype rule
                            • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                            Text

                            Variant 1

                            combine=0
                            • Full-Illithid
                            You used to take yourself rather seriously, you know...
                            h0d028dbagd598g4e11g8c40g6e614fb3c5d6 | 9e601e2f-2009-4601-8039-3a0a4f36ada8 | stub

                            Variant 2

                            You used to take yourself rather seriously, you know...
                            h4e0b2f84g1b11g472aga26dg6b979b65f4e8 | c99ee73c-e8e8-4a3e-b0c0-530d8d8e38fa | stub

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c81a040c-6ec0-e11b-a303-21ec2a69f428Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h0d028dbagd598g4e11g8c40g6e614fb3c5d6Text 1 UUID: 9e601e2f-2009-4601-8039-3a0a4f36ada8Text 2 Handle: h4e0b2f84g1b11g472aga26dg6b979b65f4e8Text 2 UUID: c99ee73c-e8e8-4a3e-b0c0-530d8d8e38faShow Once: True
                            • +
                              15.Gale: I did. But meeting you, travelling that strangest of roads together, I learned to see myself differently. See the Weave differently.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0664f8c9-88b4-f4cb-085a-1ad8d15ba341Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h03cd1121g5f2dg4d04g9245g1d72e043c2f5Text UUID: 313928b6-39c4-4fc2-80a6-0060d958abcbTimeline Phase Index: 134Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0664f8c9-88b4-f4cb-085a-1ad8d15ba341Timeline Phase Duration: 13.68sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                              • See Node 203 (Gale) In fact, I've actually been considering writing down the story of our adventures. The true tale of our flawed but ultimately endearing troupe, and the trials and tribulations we overcame.
                          • +
                            362.Player: I'm glad to hear that. The Weave is not fodder for idle study. It's dangerous, and should be treated as such.BardCleric of MystraSorcererWarlockWizard!Full-Illithid

                            Flags and Tags

                            ruletagtype rule

                            • Sorcerer {18266c0b-efbc-4c80-8784-ada4a37218d7}
                            • Warlock {5804f55a-93f7-4281-9512-8d548a9e2a22}

                            Text

                            Variant 1

                            combine=0
                            • Bard
                            • Cleric of Mystra
                            • Sorcerer
                            • Warlock
                            • Wizard
                            I'm glad to hear that. The Weave is not fodder for idle study. It's dangerous, and should be treated as such.
                            h3be79528ged38g4690gb224gd13897413a34 | b62fb64c-86f3-45b6-94bf-c997d3ff5da6 | stub

                            Variant 2

                            I'm glad to hear that. Magic is no idle study. It's dangerous, and should be treated as such.

                              Node Type: JumpUUID: d795f360-3f99-a5e0-ad2d-cc1d1975ec88Jump Target: Node 363 (a7f0bfe7-dcda-0a0e-ac60-419c155acfca)Jump Target Point: 1
                  • +
                    318.Gale: She sought me out, not long after we went our separate ways, and assured me neither she nor the orb should pose me any threat in the future.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8baa9bf0-944e-d6f4-ec7f-9ca21e967625Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hef46d540gbfacg4b4bg981cgecc1b607435aText UUID: 8208225d-f103-4324-9116-ff7b371181a2Timeline Phase Index: 129Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8baa9bf0-944e-d6f4-ec7f-9ca21e967625Timeline Phase Duration: 24.45sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 8baa9bf0-944e-d6f4-ec7f-9ca21e967625Group Index: 0
                    • +
                      4.Gale: Of course, it's still in there. A constant reminder of my former hubris, and a surprisingly effective means of keeping my more disobedient students in line. Perhaps a tad too effective.

                      Text

                      Of course, it's still in there. A constant reminder of my former hubris, and a surprisingly effective means of keeping my more disobedient students in line. Perhaps a tad too effective.
                      hc1b5fc16gf91fg49ccg924cg6a2840565074 | 1e838ecd-3bf4-4926-ac3c-3e95616589a2 | stub

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 019cb758-1c63-9163-86bd-ebd599f4e59eSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hc1b5fc16gf91fg49ccg924cg6a2840565074Text UUID: 1e838ecd-3bf4-4926-ac3c-3e95616589a2Group ID: 8baa9bf0-944e-d6f4-ec7f-9ca21e967625Group Index: 1
                      • See Node 97 (Gale) I spend most of my time trying to convince them how much fun the study of magic can be, but it'd be easier to crack a smile on an intellect devourer than some of my pupils...
        • +

          49.Gale: Fear not. My heart has survived far crueller partings, and lived to tell the tale.note: Lays a hand on his heart to emphasise the point

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 15a12856-7d6a-58d3-75aa-c68c34e28236Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: ha251459eg096ag4b91g8b56gb87b93b01c79Text UUID: a2cee158-4ba4-4955-a2ea-973442e23731Timeline Phase Index: 126Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 15a12856-7d6a-58d3-75aa-c68c34e28236Timeline Phase Duration: 6.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • +
            13.Gale: I assure you, I meant exactly what I said to you at the time. Perfect as they are, some things aren't made to last forever.END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedGale

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
            • END_GameFinale_State_PartnershipEndedGale {fa62b0f8-c884-4f68-b507-b70b9277b6de} = True

            • +
              292.Gale: I feel quite certain that the bond of friendship between us will have far more longevity.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7fd8f7e0-04c7-e882-8180-87ddcbdc4a5fSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hea27c24cg0387g4002g82aag9bc2403d59a9Text UUID: 74993711-f380-484f-9388-89bf891a6933Timeline Phase Index: 46Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7fd8f7e0-04c7-e882-8180-87ddcbdc4a5fTimeline Phase Duration: 5.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • +
                468.Speaker 2: This is why Mrs Dekarios and I will be waiting an eternity more for grandchildren.8a4a686d-6c47-411f-a0b3-d79ff33e2922

          • +
            384.Gale: Who better to warn of the perils of misusing magic than someone who was once only a wayward sneeze away from destroying a mid-sized settlement?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b4bacaac-21c0-e4e8-d988-e646fb7ed3a8Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h8f300a3bgb3b8g4314gbf84gcf0b744d849cText UUID: 1fcb4a3f-abf3-4b59-bc4c-1ea6a204ea9bTimeline Phase Index: 81Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b4bacaac-21c0-e4e8-d988-e646fb7ed3a8Timeline Phase Duration: 10.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

        22.Player: You found a job where you can talk as much as you like and people have to listen? Well done.AstarionShadowheartLae'zelWyllKarlach+1 more!Full-Illithid

        Flags and Tags

        ruletagtype rule
        • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
        • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
        • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
        • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
        • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
        • Dark Urge {cd611d7d-b67d-42b4-a75c-a0c6091ef8a2}
        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

        Text

        Variant 1

        combine=0
        • Astarion
        You found a job where you can talk as much as you like and people have to listen? Well done.
        h01472f5dgf3bbg4dc5g9bb9g76d7d46e577b | 0f1381b0-6d19-4569-81e0-0ab8db5798f3 | stub

        Variant 2

        combine=0
        • Shadowheart
        An educator, Gale? I can't say I'm surprised, but I am pleased for you.
        hd5b2ce09g9ecfg46acg8e38g3d2bfbb44ccc | 95249efd-48bc-4e31-8830-1bd6cfdf1a36 | stub

        Variant 3

        combine=0
        • Lae'zel
        You always did love to stretch out a point. I can't imagine anyone better suited to teaching.
        h44286b62g59f4g4107g8165gadf1fe7bd553 | 183c5d8a-a118-4807-8331-80e4d4c51def | stub

        Variant 4

        combine=0
        • Wyll
        You are as wise as you are eloquent, Gale. You were destined to be a teacher.
        h74b5e859g8a0eg4b9cg9c88g99204fbb6a11 | 01333b45-f99b-4907-b7e9-7a6bcd27e8bc | stub

        Variant 5

        combine=0
        • Karlach
        A teacher! Of course you are. No better man for the job.
        h40a602f2g6919g48d5ga1b5ge08965c5a536 | 68cca8b7-ff8c-4f82-ba62-3bcaaaa9e735 | stub

        Variant 6

        combine=0
        • Dark Urge
        Those who can't become gods, teach.
        h64cd7ad9ge748g4556ga9a1g500460243ddd | bc11cb54-95fd-4208-a844-7b40d5b4d4d8 | stub

        Metadata

        262.Player: You confine yourself to the School of Illusion? I'd have thought you could teach the entire curriculum...SorcererWarlockWizard!Full-Illithid

        Flags and Tags

        ruletagtype rule
        • Sorcerer {18266c0b-efbc-4c80-8784-ada4a37218d7}

        Text

        Variant 1

        combine=0
        • Sorcerer
        • Warlock
        • Wizard
        You confine yourself to the School of Illusion? I'd have thought you could teach the entire curriculum...
        h7111fc8cgc041g468cgbbfegb5a09b6d1450 | 3f3724ab-e61c-4883-a8d2-1a532e8745cf | stub

        Variant 2

        Only a professor? With your expertise, I'd have thought you could teach every kind of magic going...
        h4473dcc8g24acg4253g9701gd3a1ed39dad8 | 6b4e948d-386d-49c2-a691-abba6822bd2a | stub

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 73b25ed3-ad8a-a325-47b2-a22e152c4c54Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h7111fc8cgc041g468cgbbfegb5a09b6d1450Text 1 UUID: 3f3724ab-e61c-4883-a8d2-1a532e8745cfText 2 Handle: h4473dcc8g24acg4253g9701gd3a1ed39dad8Text 2 UUID: 6b4e948d-386d-49c2-a691-abba6822bd2aShow Once: True
        • +
          196.Gale: I did offer, as a matter of fact.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5a7e420d-3af4-1193-b1db-794ba7d26ae1Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hc736eaa4g61dbg4320g8b7eg488ac2269d08Text UUID: 28bda260-3ae2-45a3-9f29-b90732759e88Timeline Phase Index: 158Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5a7e420d-3af4-1193-b1db-794ba7d26ae1Timeline Phase Duration: 27.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 5a7e420d-3af4-1193-b1db-794ba7d26ae1Group Index: 0
          • +
            517.Gale: However, the Blackstaff insisted I couldn't teach every subject, nor could the simulacra of myself I offered to create for that purpose.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ed81bb39-e21b-bd87-63e0-d7ed73abd694Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hfb612dbbg0cb9g4455g9da2g8f4adc7300fdText UUID: b56d7a02-f498-4f6b-a5bf-540edb6821adGroup ID: 5a7e420d-3af4-1193-b1db-794ba7d26ae1Group Index: 1
            • +
              430.Gale: So, I've settled for teaching the art of illusion. Magic to confound the senses, to render the impossible into reality, and to allow expression of that most magical attribute of all - imagination.e8bea07f-9f7a-35b5-11ca-f98ee9a801e8_GaleMentionedIllusion

              Flags and Tags

              settype Local
              • e8bea07f-9f7a-35b5-11ca-f98ee9a801e8_GaleMentionedIllusion {dc17b64a-8953-2b4a-5f05-ca0b7e11e367} = True

              Text

              So, I've settled for teaching the art of illusion. Magic to confound the senses, to render the impossible into reality, and to allow expression of that most magical attribute of all - imagination.
              ha545c415g3e14g4e7fgb374g75fa5f509596 | ebded06b-8324-4984-8835-51060407189a | stub

        447.Player: It turns out I'm a lot happier now that my fate is back in my own hands, illithid as they are.Full-Illithid

        Flags and Tags

        ruletagtype rule
        • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

        Text

        Variant 1

        combine=0
        • Full-Illithid
        It turns out I'm a lot happier now that my fate is back in my own hands, illithid as they are.
        h6458ad57ge5b2g44feg991dg83c696776ed3 | 83bd5496-f4a3-4519-850a-216262886b6c | stub

        Variant 2

        It turns out I'm a lot happier without the omnipresent threat of death.
        h61ba56b8gf9ccg4e15gaa47gf15dfb66254f | eec0af03-2791-47f7-834a-cfd336c50c2a | stub

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d0c99106-f84d-fdd8-5ee5-f8a11536606eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h6458ad57ge5b2g44feg991dg83c696776ed3Text 1 UUID: 83bd5496-f4a3-4519-850a-216262886b6cText 2 Handle: h61ba56b8gf9ccg4e15gaa47gf15dfb66254fText 2 UUID: eec0af03-2791-47f7-834a-cfd336c50c2aShow Once: True
        • +
          88.Gale: As am I. What a relief it was to set that particular burden down at last.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2845f2d7-05fa-7139-b9a1-fe783dca4e83Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h2dc3cbe5gfeb9g42bfg9d4fg5074a80acb5dText UUID: 60b2f0ea-8623-4ad4-8409-8b0db6cf9e69Timeline Phase Index: 112Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2845f2d7-05fa-7139-b9a1-fe783dca4e83Timeline Phase Duration: 6.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
          • +
            197.Gale: Of all the outcomes I might have expected from our journey, I confess - finding love wasn't one of them. But it so often lurks in the most unexpected of places.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5a8daea7-270f-5dc8-9f40-7045fa5bc3dcSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h9505acceg3916g4c98g84bag6f344812fae3Text UUID: a1257ec4-17e8-4172-9dfa-06a2525c357fTimeline Phase Index: 159Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5a8daea7-270f-5dc8-9f40-7045fa5bc3dcTimeline Phase Duration: 11.92sTimeline Phase Shots: 4
            • +

                  283.No Speaker: Alias to Node 345
                  • +
                    345.Gale: You were quite the travelling companion, my friend. I know our paths diverge from here, but should you ever desire a wizard to walk at your side - you know where to find me.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9c0d1010-3a0a-a7e3-f21c-c081d0128c43Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: he993d864g962bg4d78gb764g40474ca064d5Text UUID: 5e198ef7-ed20-4e7d-ad1e-bc4af9a06378Timeline Phase Index: 18Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9c0d1010-3a0a-a7e3-f21c-c081d0128c43Timeline Phase Duration: 12.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • +

                544.Player: Life as the Vampire Ascendant is busier than I expected. There's my lair to decorate, spawn to recruit, a domain to protect. I'm exhausted.ORI_Astarion_State_BecameVampireLord!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell!Full-IllithidAstarion

                260.Player: I've settled back into the shadows. It turns out there's a lot more fun to be had there when you don't have a bitter, cruel vampire lord watching over you.ORI_Astarion_State_CazadorPermaDefeated!ORI_Astarion_State_BecameVampireLord!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell!Full-IllithidAstarion

                401.Player: Still smashing skulls and raging at my enemies. It's bloody brilliant.BarbarianBardClericDruidWizard+8 more!Full-Illithid

                Flags and Tags

                ruletagtype rule

                • Warlock {5804f55a-93f7-4281-9512-8d548a9e2a22}
                • Sorcerer {18266c0b-efbc-4c80-8784-ada4a37218d7}
                • Paladin {6d85ab2d-5c23-498c-a61e-98f05a00177a}
                • Oathbreaker {c7bdcdf2-15e7-456e-adf1-21dda3172e18}
                • Rogue {f8a0608b-666c-4be6-a49c-03b369c10bd2}

                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = False

                Text

                Variant 1

                combine=0
                • Barbarian
                Still smashing skulls and raging at my enemies. It's bloody brilliant.
                h281f6168g9983g4f7cga0d0gff9d032ff045 | ad48b15e-f6b1-40c4-b2bc-911d0875e7d2 | stub

                Variant 2

                combine=0
                • Bard
                My repertoire has some truly spell-binding new songs in it, inspired by our feats of unbridled heroism.
                h4934129bgb361g4769gb7bdg26a9f7f592dc | 58bd9a0d-f4f5-47e1-a2bb-0c7836746f63 | stub

                Variant 3

                combine=0
                • Cleric
                I find new purpose in my faith. There is much to be done, and I know now that prayer alone is not enough to save the world.
                h17428875g79d3g4322g8829g6ce554544e4a | e7398c6c-67d7-4e97-b6c4-3f529a646e1b | stub

                Variant 4

                combine=0
                • Druid
                I've found solace in the wilds once more. Where there is nature, I will always find my purpose.
                haeb55016g3967g48edgba40g5817c4bc7f1f | df2bc8d5-ee16-4df5-9ad8-ef5862e78ecf | stub

                Variant 5

                combine=0
                • Wizard
                I found the most excellent series of arcane tomes beneath an abandoned wizard's tower. I'll be studying those for a decade at least.
                he001cce6gff58g47d1gaabfg93a8c88028a7 | 1b0c59e1-4512-4be4-be09-cae31138c9e9 | stub

                Variant 6

                combine=0
                • Warlock
                I'm afraid were I to divulge my recent activities, I'd have to kill you. Or rather, my patron would.
                hc37857e6g2c27g4269g8c7cg735ea1da63c3 | 4914e02a-7d7b-4267-8baa-1dfc9f806118 | stub

                Variant 7

                combine=0
                • Sorcerer
                I've been enjoying my innate and effortless talent for magic, of course. No further education required.
                hf19d5bb4g65ecg4dd6gb956g805e76dac2af | a014f5c9-e13c-4450-98cb-d37036d2e5f2 | stub

                Variant 8

                combine=0
                • Paladin
                • Oathbreaker
                I've been following the path my oath laid before me. My doctrine holds fast, as does my pledge to aid those it protects.
                h792ee417gc557g4870gac71ga4ff97c77c46 | bf0d9456-963e-4e54-899d-f9e3ec6c2d2a | stub

                Variant 9

                combine=0
                • Rogue
                I'd like to say I've been up to no good... And that would be true. I've been up to no good.
                hf5601d56g769ag43d2gbdf8g7fc2faec288d | f3c4ef7f-bda3-45ef-83f1-4f66e122c8b2 | stub

                Variant 10

                combine=0
                • Ranger
                I've been enjoying the solitude of life on the road, going where I'm wanted, and staying no longer than I'm needed.
                h713fb603g21beg4cd4g91b1g0ae49f7ae00d | c56af047-1239-4a89-ad1b-327f3d9aba19 | stub

                Variant 11

                combine=0
                • Monk
                Our journey together granted me unprecedented clarity. I feel more connected to my Ki than ever.
                h1db9451eg8ba9g424cg8815ga06c8e1a6dd4 | 67431b35-8ed8-4651-a58c-903fac420440 | stub

                Variant 12

                combine=0
                • Fighter
                I've kept my weapons sharp and my mind sharper. If there's another world-ending threat awaiting us, I'll be ready.
                h8e657dd6g3052g4b13g8e2ag2ffaedcf5ac4 | c296b041-3579-47f0-8d05-f8bd038f9280 | stub

                Variant 13

                combine=0
                • Oathbreaker
                I've been learning to see the world anew, without the tunnel vision my oath imposed. It's been... enlightening.
                h32569270gfc41g4098g8850gdf64e02519c7 | 4a9c1954-6d87-4c84-ad73-c6f45dcc89bb | stub

                • +
                  71.No Speaker: Alias to Node 345
                  • See Node 345 (Gale) You were quite the travelling companion, my friend. I know our paths diverge from here, but should you ever desire a wizard to walk at your side - you know where to find me.
      • +
        190.Player: I can't complain. Though if I'm being entirely honest, I rather miss having the little squirmer along for the ride...!Full-Illithid

        Flags and Tags

        • +
          117.Gale: In that case, I'd highly recommend taking the time to expand your social horizons. You can do better than a worm for company, I promise you.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 33ca8289-f937-ae55-2487-3181c3c74f77Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: hb92db6ebg1d6eg417fgbe35g085124f160acText UUID: 7bb303fb-0bcc-46f5-9626-5c2cc079cac0Timeline Phase Index: 150Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 33ca8289-f937-ae55-2487-3181c3c74f77Timeline Phase Duration: 9.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
          • See Node 197 (Gale) Of all the outcomes I might have expected from our journey, I confess - finding love wasn't one of them. But it so often lurks in the most unexpected of places.
      • +

      215.Gale: Well! Sounds like you've been keeping yourself very busy indeed. It was never like you to lay about, so I shouldn't be surprised.

      168.Gale: Well! Sounds like you've been keeping yourself very busy indeed - and in good company, too. It was never like you to lay about, so I shouldn't be surprised.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4e7a1c8f-6ec4-8be2-47ee-f3d74119e5dbSpeaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h0a049f3cg8a90g4452g9b6ag5208bba14511Text UUID: 00814988-06bf-486d-a830-2a5d76322ea9Timeline Phase Index: 187Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4e7a1c8f-6ec4-8be2-47ee-f3d74119e5dbTimeline Phase Duration: 13.92sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
      • See Node 161 (Gale) (no line text)
    • +
      211.Gale: I'm sorry to hear things have been so difficult. You have my sympathy, but not my pity. If anyone can do what needs doing, it's you.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 60fb6d10-a5da-a9b1-6081-a06a6e0db809Speaker: 0 (Gale)Text Handle: h0269ba66g5de2g4f10g9c33g70b59e421a13Text UUID: a02357b4-edc1-4937-b825-57303efcd7cdTimeline Phase Index: 166Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 60fb6d10-a5da-a9b1-6081-a06a6e0db809Timeline Phase Duration: 12.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
      • See Node 161 (Gale) (no line text)
    • +
